title: BUSINESS OPERATIONS & SYSTEMS ORGANISER
description:
JOB TITLE

BUSINESS OPERATIONS & SYSTEMS ORGANISER



==================================================



JOB DESCRIPTION

An established Australian business is looking for a full-time Business Operations & Systems Organiser to help build the financial tracking, reporting, and organisational systems the business needs as it grows. This is a role with real responsibility - you will work closely with the business owner to design and maintain the tools that give them a clear view of their numbers at all times.



The business already has one VA handling day-to-day operations. This role works alongside them but focuses on a different layer - expense tracking, bookkeeping, reporting, and keeping things organised behind the scenes. You will work directly with the business owner to understand what data matters, build practical systems to capture it, and keep everything running smoothly.



If you enjoy turning messy problems into clean, working systems and you like having the space to figure things out - you will do well here.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Full-time, long-term position (40 hours per week)

* Stable role with an established Australian business

* PHP 33,500 starting salary, increasing to PHP 35,000 after probation

* 13th month pay and government-mandated benefits

* Fully remote - work from home

* Casual, supportive working environment with a direct and approachable business owner

* Real ownership and autonomy - you build the systems, not just maintain them



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Build and maintain financial tracking systems (Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar) that link income and expenses to individual accounts

* Record operational costs and track profitability at the account level

* Track total funds across accounts and pending withdrawals so the business owner always has a clear cash position

* Manage bookkeeping in Xero, including regular reconciliation

* Produce weekly reports covering balances, expenses, profit per account, and account purchasing trends

* Spot and raise anything that looks off in the numbers early, so small issues don't become big ones

* Design and build new tracking or reporting systems as needs come up, using AI tools where they help

* Help the business owner stay on top of their week - following up on pending items, flagging deadlines, and keeping things structured

* Coordinate with the first VA where workflows connect, particularly around transaction data



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Comfortable working with numbers - you do not need to be an accountant, but financial data should feel natural to you

* Confident with spreadsheets and data tools (Airtable, Google Sheets, or similar) - you have built trackers or structured systems before

* Comfortable with Xero or happy to learn it - bookkeeping will be a regular part of the role and we will support you getting up to speed

* A natural self-starter - you are the kind of person who looks for what needs doing and gets on with it, asking questions along the way

* Strong written and spoken English - you will write reports and summaries, and communicate daily via 

* Already using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) in your work - even in simple ways, as long as it is part of how you actually get things done

* Happy working in a role that will evolve over time - the systems are still being built, and that is part of what makes this role interesting

* Reliable computer and stable internet connection



---



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



* Prior bookkeeping or accounting experience

* Familiarity with Airtable, including views, formulas, and linked records

* Experience building operational dashboards or reporting systems

* Background in a data-driven business (e-commerce, trading, finance, or similar)



---



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Australian daytime hours (approximately 10am - 6pm AEST)

* Daily communication via 



==================================================



Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions for the hiring process.

title: Amazon Brand Manager & Brand Manager Intern
description:
AMAZON BRAND MANAGER



We are looking for a talented and versatile Amazon Brand Manager! If you think that you have what it takes to be successful in this role, we welcome you to apply!



Do you like going from one meeting to another with non-stop action and solving problems every day while managing 8 people? Where you are trying to please clients and juggling tons of competing priorities? If so, this is the job for you.



Brand Managers own the relationships at our agency. It’s your job to make customers like us while delivering our team’s accurate non-stop activities.



Responsibilities:

- Manage clients' accounts assigned. The Brand Manager will act as the direct point of contact for the client, responsible for coordinating MAGs services, implementing strategy, communicating with clients, direct reports, and leadership.

- 2+ Direct Reports. In addition to client services, this position is also a managerial position, and following the completion of training, brand managers will be expected to lead a small team of Amazon specialists, who will assist the manager with delivering MAG services to the client.

- Brand managers are the company's backbone, directly responsible for our client accounts.

- Proactively provide a strategy for the account, communicate with the client, and ensure MAG process and deliverables are met.

- Delegate tasks properly to your direct reports and the MAG teams, follow up on delegations, hold staff accountable, and report back to the client.



Qualifications:

- Amazon Expertise: 1+ year with Seller Central (flat files, FBA, PPC, SEO, reinstatements, brand registry, Helium10, keyword research).

- Agency & Management: Experience handling multiple demands, leading teams, hiring, and performance management.

- Project & Client Management: Skilled in multitasking, project management, client communication, and account ownership.

- Tech-Savvy: Comfortable with tools like Zoom, Slack, Asana, and adapting in fast-changing environments.

- Passion for eCommerce: Independent, people-focused, and driven to grow client sales on Amazon.



Expectations:

- Competitive salary!

- Fun Fully Remote Culture – Community Culture, Team Oriented Environment

- You can have your OWN Amazon selling business and utilize company resources to build your own account! We love and ? encourage entrepreneurs, in fact, the majority of employees have their own selling accounts!

- Unlimited Learning and Growth – If you meet and exceed our core values and grow sales, you will have unlimited opportunities to grow, advance, promote, and earn more.

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- Permanent WFH setup

- The work schedule is in Eastern Standard Time (Monday to Friday only)

- A dual-monitor setup is required (at least 8GB of RAM)

- Good quality camera and microphone

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Must consistently maintain good performance and seek skills development for professional growth.





------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------





AMAZON BRAND MANAGER INTERN



Want to catapult out of that “Walmart uniform” and into a world of digital marketing?



We're hiring a Brand Manager Intern at our agency. If you're a tech-savvy gamer who thrives amidst organized chaos, then you are the one that we are looking for!



We will train you how to manage people effectively, communicate better with clients, and navigate tools such as Slack smoothly, while you work at home on your computer. You also get to learn how to sell on Amazon which is the number 1 wealth generation platform in the USA for beginners.



Here's what you'd be doing with us:

- Mastermind core services like PPC, SEO, Design, Catalog merchandising, and troubleshoot like a pro.

- Take charge of at least 8-10 accounts in Seller Central Accounts under a Brand Manager.

- Be the communication bridge between clients and our agency.

- Train and mentor at least 2 AS Intern/BM Intern.



Yes, it's challenging. Yes, it's exciting. Yes, it could be the start of your new career!



We will train you on everything. MAG is an education company and we find it’s easier to find the right culture fit and then train the skills than the other way around.



We're looking for:

- High Drive

- Friendly Introverts

- Strategic Communication Skills

- Ability to take charge, and follow through on a plan



So what are you waiting for? Toss away that nametag and make the switch today.



Expectations:

- 40 hours a week, 8 hours a day

- You work on your own computer and dual monitors

- Must have at least 25 MBPS internet speed

- Know how to use basic Google Sheets and Excel functions



You’ve got the talent—we’ve got the opportunity. Take control of your career and apply now!



For any questions or follow-ups,
 us at

title: DSP Strategist
description:
We are looking for a DSP Strategist who combines strong brand management and strategic marketing skills with a solid understanding of digital advertising. In this role, you’ll own the planning, strategy, and campaign oversight for our programmatic display and performance campaigns. The ideal candidate thrives at the intersection of brand growth and data-driven marketing, translating insights into actionable campaign strategies that drive measurable business outcomes.



Responsibilities:

- Develop and execute comprehensive DSP campaign strategies that align with brand objectives and business goals.

- Collaborate closely with the DSP Manager to ensure campaigns are optimized for performance while staying on-brand.

- Act as the bridge between brand vision and programmatic execution, providing insights and recommendations for targeting, creatives, and messaging.

- Monitor campaign performance, analyze trends, and report actionable insights to stakeholders.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams (marketing, creative, analytics) to ensure consistency and effectiveness of campaigns.

- Identify opportunities for campaign growth, testing, and innovation within programmatic channels.

- Oversee budget allocation and pacing to maximize ROI across campaigns.

- Stay current with programmatic advertising trends, tools, and industry best practices to maintain a competitive advantage.



Qualifications:

- 3–5 years of experience in brand management, digital marketing, or programmatic advertising strategy.

- Strong understanding of DSP platforms, programmatic media, and performance marketing principles.

- Excellent analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable marketing insights.

- Experience collaborating with cross-functional teams to execute integrated marketing campaigns.

- Preferred:

- Experience in e-commerce or DTC brand marketing.

- Familiarity with analytics tools (Google Analytics, Looker, Tableau, or equivalent).

- Previous experience managing paid media campaigns with significant budgets.

- Knowledge of emerging advertising technologies and trends in programmatic marketing.

- Strategic thinker with a strong sense of brand and consumer behavior.

- Strong communication and presentation skills for internal and external stakeholders.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent WFH setup

- Unlimited FREE access to MAG School courses and SOP Library!

- Work schedule is in EST (Monday-Friday only)

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

title: Business Analyst
description:
We are seeking a highly strategic, tech-forward Business Analyst to serve as the connective tissue between stakeholders, operations, and IT execution. This role is responsible for identifying business bottlenecks, architecting scalable system solutions, and driving technology initiatives that elevate performance across the entire organization.



This is not a passive documentation role. This person must think like an operator.



The ideal candidate understands Agency operations deeply, sees operational inefficiencies before they become problems, and can translate business complexity into executable IT projects. Amazon account management, listing optimization, and PPC experience is a strong asset. They must be comfortable challenging assumptions, aligning leadership on priorities, and guiding technical teams toward high-impact outcomes.



Key Responsibilities:

- Lead discovery sessions to uncover operational constraints and workflow inefficiencies.

- Analyze processes end-to-end, mapping current and future workflows for scalability.

- Translate business challenges into project charters, requirements, and actionable plans.

- Collaborate with IT to validate feasibility, manage resources, and oversee execution.

- Identify automation and AI opportunities to improve operations, reporting, and content.

- Enhance systems, dashboards, CRMs, and cross-platform integrations for efficiency.

- Develop scalable SOPs, optimize workflows, and increase output without adding headcount.

- Serve as liaison between technical and non-technical teams, driving alignment and supporting change management.



Qualifications:

- 4+ years experience in Business Analysis, Systems Strategy, Operations Strategy, or similar high-impact role

- Strong working knowledge of Amazon Seller Central and/or Vendor Central operations

- Proven experience leading cross-functional IT initiatives from discovery to launch

- Strong technical literacy (APIs, automation tools, CRM systems, system integrations)

- Experience working directly with developers and technical teams

- Strong documentation and process-mapping skills

- Excellent executive-level communication and stakeholder management skills

- Strategic thinker with the ability to balance short-term fixes with long-term scalability

- Computer engineering/science background or equivalent experience

- Permanent remote setup

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Please apply only if you are fluent in English. You will speak English full-time with potential clients and support the CEO directly. This is a high-performance, high-output role that requires full commitment and consistency.



It's not suited for someone seeking a relaxed schedule or strong work-life balance. We're looking for individuals who are driven, disciplined, and ready to put in the hard work to succeed. It is a full-time role, please only apply if you are available full-time. We work EU hours, starting at 8:30 Berlin time.



Who We're Looking For:



• Fluent in English with a clear, neutral accent

• Hungry, disciplined, and reliable

• Coachable and eager to learn fast in a hands-on environment

• Comfortable with high daily outreach volume across calls, messages, and
s

• Organized and proactive, able to juggle multiple priorities without dropping the ball

• Experience with tools like Clay, Instantly, HeyReach, or similar outreach platforms is a strong plus

• Previous experience in a setter, SDR, or executive assistant role increases your chances



What You'll Do:



• Make up to 200 outbound call attempts per day (scripts and training provided)

• Reply to and manage conversations with up to 200 prospects per day across multiple channels

• Create and publish content across social media platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, X, YouTube, TikTok,
)

• Provide direct executive support to the CEO - scheduling, research, coordination, and ad hoc tasks as needed

• Help maintain and optimize CRM data, outreach workflows, and daily performance tracking

• Follow established systems and playbooks while flagging opportunities to improve them



What You Get:



• 100% remote - work from anywhere

• Full access to our $30K+ sales training library

• 1:1 mentorship and daily support from the CEO

• Opportunity to grow into a senior role as the company scales

• Be part of a fast-growing international team

• Regular team events across different European countries



About Chrysales: Chrysales is a Berlin-based B2B sales consulting and AI automation agency that helps companies implement proven sales strategies and scale their revenue operations.



We work with businesses across Europe and North America, combining hands-on consulting with cutting-edge AI-driven systems to deliver real, measurable growth.



To apply:



1. Create a Miro Mind Map

Show everything you’ve done so far on Miro board. Include tools you can work with, clear numbers, KPIs, and results.



2. Create a 3-Month Plan

Define your daily actions, outreach volume, and channels.



3. Loom Video (max 7 min)

Explain both in a clear, structured way.

title: Paid Media Specialist (B2B)
description:
We are seeking a strategic and results-driven Paid Media Specialist (B2B) to lead and scale our paid acquisition and demand generation efforts. This role is responsible for driving qualified leads, pipeline growth, and revenue through data-backed performance marketing strategies.



The ideal candidate is highly fluent in Google Ads and Meta 
 & Instagram) advertising, with a strong understanding of B2B funnels, attribution, and lifecycle marketing. TikTok experience is a plus. This role sits under the Marketing Department and works closely with Sales, Content, Creative, and CRO teams to ensure consistent, scalable growth.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design, execute, and optimize B2B performance marketing campaigns across Google Ads and Meta to drive leads, MQLs, SQLs, and pipeline growth.

- Own full-funnel strategy from awareness to conversion, managing budgets, bidding, targeting, and channel mix to maximize ROI.

- Analyze campaign performance using GA4, ad platform data, CRM insights, and dashboards to guide decisions and forecasting.

- Continuously test and optimize creatives, audiences, offers, and landing pages, partnering with CRO to improve conversion rates.

- Collaborate with creative and content teams to develop high-performing ad copy and creatives aligned with ICPs and buyer stages.

- Lead and mentor media buyers and performance marketers, supporting recruitment, onboarding, training, and skill development.

- Build scalable workflows, SOPs, and documentation to streamline paid acquisition and lead generation processes.

- Ensure alignment and collaboration across Sales, RevOps, and Marketing teams

- Stay current on performance marketing trends, platform updates, and emerging channels, maintaining certifications and exploring new opportunities.



Qualifications:

- 3+ years in performance marketing with a strong B2B lead generation focus

- Deep expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads (TikTok is a plus)

- Proven experience managing full-funnel B2B campaigns tied to pipeline and revenue

- Strong understanding of CRO, landing page optimization, and A/B testing

- Experience working with CRM systems and marketing attribution

- Proven leadership experience managing and developing teams

- Data-driven mindset with strong analytical and optimization skills

- Excellent communication, organization, and stakeholder management skills



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent remote setup

- Unlimited free access to MAG School courses and SOP Library

title: Outbound Sales Development Representative
description:
This role is strategically focused on generating new business opportunities through targeted outbound outreach. The Outbound SDR serves as the first point of contact for potential clients, identifying prospects, initiating conversations, and driving them into the sales pipeline. You will manage outbound campaigns, conduct personalized outreach, and build strong engagement with high-value leads. This position requires strong persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build effective processes for high-touch outbound engagement.



Goal:

To create a steady flow of qualified outbound opportunities by identifying, engaging, and advancing potential clients into meaningful sales conversations.



Key Responsibilities:

- Outbound Prospecting: Identify and target potential clients through
, calls, and social outreach to generate qualified leads for the sales team.

- Personalized Outreach: Create tailored messaging for specific industries, decision-makers, or company profiles to increase engagement and response rates.

- Pipeline Generation: Build and maintain a strong pipeline of outbound leads, ensuring consistent activity and follow-ups.

- Lead Qualification: Evaluate outbound prospects to ensure alignment with service offerings and pass qualified opportunities to the sales team.

- Collaboration With Sales & Marketing: Work closely with sales to refine ideal client profiles and with marketing to improve outbound messaging and campaign performance.

- CRM Management: Keep detailed, accurate records of outreach activity, follow-ups, and prospect interactions within the CRM.

- Process Building & Optimization: Develop, refine, and scale processes for efficient and high-touch outbound engagement.



Qualifications:

- Experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or a similar role is preferred.

- Strong organizational skills with excellent attention to detail.

- Proven track record of consistently meeting or exceeding outreach and pipeline targets.

- Advanced knowledge of HubSpot preferred; experience with other CRM tools is a plus.

- Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

- Motivated self-starter with the ability to work independently and drive tasks forward.

- Comfortable with leadership, taking initiative, and improving workflows.

- Strong interpersonal skills: able to communicate value clearly, handle objections, and build rapport during outbound conversations.

- Has a history of building processes around high-touch outbound client engagement.



What We Offer:

- Competitive salary base

- Permanent WFH setup

- Unlimited FREE access to MAG School courses and SOP Library!

- Work schedule is in EST (Monday-Friday only)

- Opportunities for professional development and career advancement

title: Product Analytics Manager (Amplitude)
description:
We’re a growing digital business looking for an experienced Amplitude analytics specialist to take day-to-day ownership of our product analytics. We already have a structured tracking setup and dedicated CRO team. Your role will be to maintain, improve, and monitor our Amplitude implementation - ensuring experiments are set up correctly, data is accurate, and performance issues are identified early. This is a long-term, stable remote role with real ownership.



What You’ll Do

- Own and manage our Amplitude workspace

- Maintain and enforce tracking plans

- Set up and validate A/B tests designed by our CRO team

- Ensure experiments are tracking correctly before and after launch

- Build and maintain dashboards used across the business

- Monitor traffic and conversion performance across global markets

- Analyse performance by country, device, browser and user type

- Spot anomalies, tracking issues or revenue-impacting problems

- Work closely with product and developers to maintain clean event data



What We’re Looking For

- Minimum 1 year hands-on experience using Amplitude

- Experience setting up Amplitude for websites or products

- Experience creating dashboards and reports

- Experience supporting or implementing A/B tests

- Strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working independently

- Fluent English (written and spoken)

- Available to work full UK business hours



About Us

- Fully remote team

- Small, fast-moving digital business

- Multiple global websites and products



What We Offer

- Competitive salary including 13th month pay

- Paid holiday including all local holidays

- Stable long-term job

- Opportunity to grow with the company



How to Apply

Alongside your CV, please include:

- A brief example of an Amplitude project you’ve worked on

- A dashboard you’ve created (screenshots welcome)

title: Business Development Representative & Cold Call Sales Specialist
description:

 management to schedule prospective clients w/ our Sales Managers.

 Marketing and follow-ups

title: VA / Process Support Executive
description:
***THIS ROLE REQUIRES PREVIOUS VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH TRADE-RELATED SERVICE COMPANIES (HVAC, ROOFING, SOLAR, PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL, OR CONSTRUCTION)***



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:



If you would like to be considered for this role, please complete the following steps:



1. Use “VA” as the subject line of your application.

2. Include a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience.

3. Provide a link to your CV/Resume.



Please note: Applications submitted without a CV/Resume will not be reviewed.



About the Role:

We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist our HVAC office managers based in the United States. In this role, you will provide administrative and operational support to help keep day-to-day office processes running smoothly.



You’ll work closely with our team to handle documentation, process paperwork, and assist with customer-related tasks so our office managers can focus on higher-level business operations. If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and supporting growing service businesses, this could be a great fit for you.



Key Responsibilities:

• Prepare and process invoices for HVAC services, repairs, and equipment

• Submit equipment warranty registrations for completed installations

• Prepare and file rebate documentation for energy-efficient HVAC systems

• Assist with creating and scheduling social media posts for HVAC businesses

• Provide administrative support to office managers

• Maintain accurate digital records and documentation

• Follow established processes to ensure tasks are completed correctly

• Communicate with tea
mbers to keep workflows organized and on track

• Provide occasional support with customer service tasks when needed



Requirements:

• Strong English communication skills: spoken and written (REQUIRED)

• Previous experience working as a Virtual Assistant, Administrative Assistant, or Process Support Specialist (REQUIRED)

• Experience supporting trade-related businesses such as HVAC, plumbing, solar, electrical, roofing, or similar industries (REQUIRED)

• Experience handling permits, rebates, or documentation for service businesses (PREFERRED)

• Familiarity with creating professional social media content

• Comfortable using common office software and online tools

• Tech-savvy and able to quickly learn new systems

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks while meeting deadlines

• Positive attitude and willingness to support growing businesses



Work Schedule:

• Full-time remote position

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week

title: Backend Specialist
description:
Full-time | Remote | 5PM–1AM PH



We're looking for someone who genuinely enjoys making messy systems make sense.



You’ll work alongside a lead to build and maintain clean, scalable backend systems (primarily in Zoho) for our clients.



Architecture decisions sit with the lead, but this is collaborative. We want your input. If you see a better way to structure something, say it. We build together.



We design systems that still make sense 12 months from now, not quick fixes that break next quarter.



What You'll Do

- You'll be hands-on building backend systems, primarily in Zoho CRM



That includes:

- Building CRM modules and layouts

- Creating and maintaining workflow rules

- Supporting automation logic

- Creating forms, structured data flows, dashboards

- Troubleshooting broken processes and identifying root causes

- Documenting clearly

- Exploring new tools as projects evolve



We like backend thinkers. If something feels inefficient or unclear, you raise it.



What We're Looking For

- You have hands-on experience building backend systems inside a CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, Pipedrive, etc.). That part is non-negotiable.

- Zoho CRM experience is strongly preferred, but if you've built clean systems in another CRM and can demonstrate strong backend logic, we're open.



You:

- Can build workflow rules independently

- Think in systems, not just tasks

- Prefer root cause over surface fixes

- Document as you go

- Stay calm when debugging

- Understand backend cause-and-effect



If someone points you to CommandCenter, a new Zoho app, or asks you to build an Excel macro - you won’t freeze. You'll test, experiment, and figure it out.



Bonus if you've worked with:



- Zoho Checkout, Creator, Forms

- Zapier or Make

- Spreadsheet logic (Excel / Google Sheets)

- Google Apps Script



Even better if you occasionally say:  “Here’s what I'd suggest instead.” We like people who care enough to think!



How We Work:



- Open collaboration

- Ownership without ego

- Clear communication

- Sustainable pace

- Serious about good systems, serious about being decent humans



If this sounds like your kind of work, send us your application along with a short 1-2 minute video intro. Tell us about a backend system you built and what you'd improve if you rebuilt it today.

* Adapting to different brand voices and visual styles.

* Adaptable: Can switch from "Soft Feminine" for personal brands to "Professional" for agency clients. 

* Has fast internet connection and good laptop/desktop storage.



Growth Opportunity

This role has the potential to move to Full-Time as the brand and agency expand. 



How to Apply

1. Short introduction + why you’re a strong fit.

3. Resume.

title: Google Ads Assistant
description:
We require a Google Ads Assistant who deeply understands the use of broad, phrase, and exact match negative keywords to assist us with assigning search terms for the Search Terms Report to predefined Exclusion Lists that affect all campaigns, a particular group of campaigns, or just one campaign. You will not be working in our client accounts, but you will be working on Google Sheets. We anticipate 1 hour per day and intend to use multiple gig workers. Those who respond quickly to communication, deliver efficiently with exceptional quality and attention to detail, and provide cost-effective quotes for us will be frequently used. 



Write a 6-sentence paragraph in British English explaining why we should consider you for this gig, and at the end, ask us to send you the competency test. 



The competency test is a miniature version of the daily tasks, and asks you to determine whether the search term should be broad, phrase, or negative, and which list it should be added to based on a particular context. You may even need to divvy up the search term to ensure accurate categorisation of match type and exclusion list type.

title: Packaging Graphic Designer
description:
Job Summary:

We are a a young and dynamic growing E-commerce company focusing on baby and maternity products with customers based in the USA, Canada, and Europe. We are seeking a capable Packaging Graphic Designer to deliver positive results in packaging design. If you are looking for a challenging, rewarding, and fulfilling career, we welcome you to apply for the job below.



Key Responsibilities:

• Build packaging layouts on dielines (boxes, sleeves, labels, inserts, hang tags, stickers) using KeaBabies brand guidelines.

• Apply and format packaging content: approved copy, icons, benefit callouts, charts, barcodes/UPCs, product info, and required markings.

• Prepare print-ready files: correct bleed/safe zones, dieline alignment, CMYK setup, font handling (outline/package), linked images, and export specs.

• Create internal review mockups (clean 2D + simple 3D visuals) for quick approvals.

• Handle packaging updates and versioning quickly (pack count/size changes, language/copy updates, claim changes, retailer/Amazon variants, seasonal refreshes).

• Design occasional full-color packaging boxes for existing products (front/back/sides), keeping hierarchy clear and branding consistent.

• Maintain packaging templates and systems so new SKUs/variations stay consistent (type scale, grids, icon rules, layout logic).

• Organize and deliver final handoff packages to Product Development (clear file naming, folder structure, exports, and “final” version control).



Must-have requirements:

• Packaging design + production experience (consumer goods preferred), with ability to work from dielines.

• Strong understanding of print production basics:

1. bleed / safe zone / trim

2. CMYK vs RGB

3. exporting print-ready PDFs

4. font handling (outlining/packaging) + linked assets

• High attention to detail (typo-free, aligned layouts, consistent spacing, correct SKUs/info).

• Ability to execute both minimal / limited-ink e-commerce packaging, and full-color box designs for existing products when needed.

• Comfortable with fast iteration + versioning (counts, sizes, copy/claim updates, variants).

• Strong file hygiene: organized layers, naming conventions, clean exports, version control.

• Clear communication and ability to implement feedback quickly in an async remote workflow.

• Capability to use the following tools:

1. Adobe Illustrator

2. Adobe Photoshop + Acrobat



Nice-to-have, but optional:

• Working knowledge of InDesign

• Experience with Amazon/e-commerce packaging constraints (clarity-first layouts, compliance callouts)



Portfolio requirements:

• Portfolio showing packaging work (ideally includes at least: - one minimal/limited-ink style layout, and - one full-color box design)



Additional Information:

• Title your message: "I want to be your next Packaging Graphic Designer"

• No moonlighting is allowed during work hours in this role.

title: Video Content Creator/Manager
description:

If you think you're the right one and up for a challenge, we welcome you to apply for the job below.



Key Responsibilities:

• Lead and manage a team of video editors, overseeing the end-to-end video production function, owning strategy, execution, and delivery from concept development through post-production and final distribution.

• Develop, refine, and contribute to video concepts, scripts, storyboards, and creative treatments that align with campaign goals and target audiences.

• Assist in building and maintaining content calendars, production schedules, and timelines to ensure on-time delivery of video assets while balancing multiple projects and priorities.

• Stay up to date with video trends, platform best practices, and audience behaviour to inform creative direction and content strategy.

• Ensure all video content consistently adheres to brand guidelines, including tone of voice, visual identity, messaging, and overall quality standards.

• Identify opportunities to optimize and improve video workflows, tools, and production processes to increase efficiency, scalability, and creative output.

• Organize, maintain, and manage video assets, raw footage, and final files to ensure accessibility, proper version control, and long-term usability.

• Review and analyze video performance metrics to continuously improve content quality and effectiveness

• Continuously test, iterate, and refine video content based on performance data, audience feedback, and business objectives.

• Take full ownership of assigned projects, ensuring consistent delivery of high-quality, on-brand video content with minimal supervision.



Requirements:

• Proficiency in professional video editing software such as Adobe • Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar tools.

• Strong understanding of video production fundamentals, including lighting, framing, composition, camera movement, audio recording, and visual storytelling.

• Familiarity with creating and optimizing video content for platforms such as Amazon, YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other digital channels.

• Relevant work experience in video production, content creation, digital media, or a related field is a strong plus.

description:

The ideal candidate will be responsible for coming up with patterns for textile products and assisting in other projects such as packaging and illustrations for baby/maternity industry. The designer will be expected to work collaboratively with our team to produce high-quality designs and assist in other design projects as and when required.

• Packaging Design: Assist in developing compelling and functional packaging designs that are on-brand, protect the product, and significantly enhance the overall customer experience.

It must clearly showcase exceptional illustration skills, a deep understanding of color theory, and the ability to create seamless repeat patterns. Examples relevant to the baby and children's product industry are highly preferred.

.

title: Product Creative Designer
description:
Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly creative and experienced Product Creative Designer to join our growing design team. In this role, you will be responsible for conceptualizing, ideating, sketching, and developing 3D models for innovative baby products that combine functionality, aesthetics, and emotional connection. You will drive early-stage product ideas — turning insights and trends into tangible concepts — and collaborate closely with our product and creative teams to bring these ideas to life.



This role requires strong conceptual thinking, aesthetic sensitivity, and technical product design skills. If you are passionate about designing purposeful baby products that make everyday parenting easier and more joyful, we would love to hear from you.



Note: Please see application instructions below.



Key Responsibilities:

• Conduct market and consumer research to identify trends, unmet needs, and product opportunities relevant to baby products.

• Generate creative and forward-thinking ideas through freehand sketching, moodboards, and visual ideation.

• Develop detailed 3D models and realistic renders that clearly communicate product form, ergonomics, and material intent.

• Collaborate with the Senior Designer, Creative, and Product Development teams to explore, refine, and finalize design directions.

• Translate abstract ideas and feedback into clear visual storytelling and refined design outputs.

• Support multiple design projects simultaneously, maintaining quality, accuracy, and alignment with brand standards.

• Use Photoshop, Illustrator, and 3D modeling tools (e.g., SolidWorks, Fusion 360) to visualize and present design concepts professionally.



Requirements:

• Minimum of 2 years of working experience in a relevant product design or industrial design role.

• A portfolio that highlights concept sketches, 3D visualizations, and final product outcomes — especially for consumer or baby-related products.

• Strong conceptual thinking — demonstrated ability to ideate and communicate design intent through clear hand sketches and storyboards.

• Creative, energetic, and passionate about the baby product industry with a focus on safety and ergonomics.

• Required proficiency in design software, including Photoshop, Illustrator, and 3D modeling skills (e.g., SolidWorks). 3D rendering skills is a plus.

• Demonstrates consistency in completing tasks on schedule and an ability to communicate clearly and professionally with the team.



General Guidelines:

title: Marketplace Listing Executive
description:
Role Overview

Lead the coordination and execution of new product launches by ensuring listings are accurate, compliant, and ready before inventory goes live. This role ensures smooth execution, clear communication, and continuous workflow improvement.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage new product listing timelines from planning to launch

• Provide structured weekly project updates with clear summaries and recommendations

• Ensure product listings are set up correctly across marketplaces including Amazon, Shopify, Target, Walmart, Faire, and Mirakl

• Maintain accurate product categorization, variations, and listing structure across marketplaces

• Ensure all listing elements are complete and accurate before launch (content, images, pricing, promotions, bundles)

• Identify listing gaps, compliance risks, or delays early and take corrective actions

• Resolve listing or compliance issues within defined timelines

• Coordinate with marketplace support teams when required to resolve listing issues

• Maintain organized and up-to-date project documentation and records

• Stay updated on marketplace requirements and policy changes

• Any other ad hoc duties or tasks as assigned



Requirements:

• Experience managing product listings on Amazon Seller Central

• Strong knowledge of Amazon flat files, variation listings, and listing requirements

• Experience with A+ Content, bulk image uploads, and account health compliance submissions

• Familiarity with Amazon promotions and bundle creation

• Proficient in Excel, Google Workspace, and basic graphic editing tools (e.g., Canva)

• Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking

• Excellent time management and ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams

• Proactive, independent, and able to take ownership of tasks

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced and evolving environment

• Must have a stable internet connection and reliable equipment

• Time tracking software may be used to support productivity and workflow management



Job Details:

• Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM (Monday to Friday)

• Tools: Monitask is used for screen and time tracking

.

Your work will directly contribute to improved keyword rankings, stronger indexing, and higher conversion rates across the Amazon marketplace.

• Document and present actionable insights clearly

Requirements:

• Strong analytical skills with high attention to detail

title: Google Ads and Meta ads Specialist (Part-Time, 40 Hours/Month)
description:
Google Ads & Meta Ads Specialist (Part-Time | Remote)

About Us

We are a UK-based digital marketing agency, not limited to a specific industry. 

We focus on results. 

We are looking for a reliable, experienced ads specialist who can take ownership of campaign setup, optimisation, reporting and tracking.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for setting up, managing and improving Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns across multiple client accounts.

This is a hands-on execution role with the opportunity to grow into more responsibility over time.

Hours & Pay

~40 hours per month

Starting May 2026

$10/hour (with opportunity to increase based on performance)





Core Responsibilities:

Google Ads-



Set up and manage campaigns (Search, Display, shopping, Performance Max)

Keyword research and negative keyword optimisation

Write and test ad copy.

Manage bidding strategies

Improve CTR, CPC, and conversions.





Meta Ads-



Set up campaigns

Build audiences (cold, lookalike, retargeting)

Run A/B tests (creative, copy, audiences)

Scale campaigns based on performance

Google Tag Manager

GA4 tracking and validation

Troubleshoot tracking issues





Optimisation-

Suggest improvements (not just follow instructions)





Requirements

Google Ads

Meta Ads

Strong experience with Google Tag Manager

Experience setting up conversion tracking correctly

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Good written English

CRO / landing page feedback

Clear tasks and expectations

Focus on results

No micromanagement, but accountability matters

Communication via WhatsApp

Occasional Google Meets for updates and catch-ups. 





To Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, you MUST include:



Your experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads

“What would you do first to improve a poorly performing Google Ads campaign?” Please send these to

title: UK Accounts Preparation Specialist (NOT Bookkeeping) | Php 55K to 70K | UK Clients | Xero Required
description:
UK Accounts Preparation Specialist (NOT Bookkeeping) | Php 55K to 70K | UK Clients | Xero Required



*** Read This First — This Is NOT a Bookkeeping Role***



We are a UK-based firm of accountants supporting hundreds of clients across multiple industries.



We are specifically hiring an Accounts Preparation Specialist with real UK statutory accounts experience.



-If your background is mainly bookkeeping, invoicing, or data entry — this role is not suitable.

-If you have hands-on experience preparing year-end statutory accounts for UK companies, keep reading.



About the Role

-You will be responsible for preparing complete, accurate, and compliant UK statutory accounts — not just maintaining books.

-You will handle multiple client files each month, working closely with UK managers and accountants to deliver audit-ready financials.

-This role requires someone who understands the full accounting cycle, not just parts of it.



What You’ll Be Doing

-Prepare year-end statutory accounts for UK clients (primarily using Xero)

-Build and maintain detailed Excel working papers for all balances

-Post and review journals (accruals, prepayments, depreciation, reclassifications)

-Perform full balance sheet reconciliations with proper supporting schedules

-Review and adjust Profit & Loss accounts

-Handle VAT reconciliations and reviews

-Support PAYE and payroll reconciliations where needed

-Calculate loan interest and related entries

-Prepare audit-ready working papers and schedules

-Work directly with UK accountants to resolve queries

-Assist in file handovers and review processes

-Prepare management accounts when required



 What We’re Looking For (Strict Requirements)

-Proven UK accounts preparation experience (statutory year-end work is essential)

-Minimum 3+ years accounting experience with UK clients

-Strong understanding of:

     Balance sheet reconciliations

     Accruals & prepayments

     VAT & PAYE

     Statutory reporting

-Xero experience is required (Sage or QuickBooks is a plus)

-Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, reconciliations, variance analysis)

-Experience with Dext / Hubdoc is a bonus

-Ability to manage multiple deadlines and client files

-Strong written and spoken English

-Reliable internet + professional home office setup



Compensation & Benefits

Php 55,000 to Php70,000/month (depending on experience)

HMO (via Intellicare) after 3 months

13th Month Pay

Paid Philippine Holidays

Work aligned with UK business hours



How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Read Carefully)



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:

3 Use 5 Apply Points



Submit ALL of the following:



-Updated Resume

-Cover Letter (must clearly demonstrate your UK accounts experience)

-Short video (REQUIRED) explaining your experience in accounts preparation and how you handle full sets of accounts



* Applications that do not follow instructions will be automatically rejected.



We are looking for professionals who can confidently handle full accounts preparation from trial balance through to final accounts. If you’re looking for long-term, stable work with a UK firm that values precision and expertise, this is an excellent opportunity.

UI/UX design skills

We are looking for a designer who can create clean, professional, and visually appealing designs that match a premiu

title: Senior PHP Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to help design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s ecommerce platforms. You’ll work on microservices, APIs, and integrations, while mentoring others and driving technical excellence.



You’ll take a leading role in shaping the architecture of our ecommerce infrastructure. You’ll build reliable APIs, optimize performance, and ensure our systems scale as we expand globally. Beyond coding, you’ll mentor teammates, influence technical direction, and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.





What You’ll Do:



Architect Our API-First Future: Design, develop, and maintain a robust and high-performance API layer that will serve as the core of our headless platform.



Own the Backend: Take full ownership of key backend services, from design to deployment, ensuring they align with our API-first strategy.



Drive Modernization: Lead the modernization of our existing system, with a clear focus on decoupling the frontend from the backend and creating a clean, API-first architecture. We prefer a pragmatic approach over the complexity and overhead of microservices.



Mentor and Lead: Guide and mentor other backend developers, sharing your expertise in API design, performance, and best practices.



Collaborate and Innovate: Work closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and business stakeholders to translate ambitious goals into practical, well-engineered API specifications and solutions.



Champion Best Practices: Introduce and advocate for modern API development tools, standards, and methodologies (e.g., OpenAPI, CI/CD, comprehensive testing).













Requirements

What We’re Looking For:



Proven Seniority: At least 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong focus on PHP.



API-First Mindset: Demonstrated experience designing and building scalable, RESTful or GraphQL APIs. You have a deep understanding of what it means to build a headless system.



PHP8 Expertise: Deep, hands-on experience with modern PHP, including PHP8 and modern design patterns like TDD. You are comfortable with frameworks like Symfony and understand the nuances of the PHP ecosystem.



Strategic & Pragmatic: You are a problem-solver who prioritizes impact and understands the challenges of a large-scale modernization project. You know when to refactor and when to build new, all while avoiding unnecessary complexity.



Ownership Mentality: You are proactive about identifying and fixing issues and feel a strong sense of responsibility for the performance and health of the codebase.



Data Savvy: Strong experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB) and a solid understanding of database design, optimization, and query performance in an API context.



Experience with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).



AI-Accelerated Development: You are knowledgeable about and in favor of using AI to accelerate the software development lifecycle. You're keen on exploring how AI can be leveraged to generate code, improve quality, and maximize output.





Nice to Have:



Experience with e-commerce or high-traffic consumer environments.



Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).



Experience with message queues (e.g., GCP PubSub) or other asynchronous processing technologies.







What We Offer:





- Growth & Ownership: A performance culture where you grow fast, take ownership early, and design your own path: with access to AI learning and real responsibility.



- International Experience: Join a diverse team of 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities, collaborating across countries, cultures, and functions.



- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-paced, tech-driven scale-up where your ideas shape the future of customised products.



- Collaboration: Learn from experienced leaders, contribute to meaningful projects, and thrive in a team that’s serious about performance and people.



- Celebrations & Culture: From work anniversaries and team events to monthly Keynotes and seasonal awards, we make time to celebrate wins and give back through volunteering.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: Senior Backend PHP Engineer - Remote
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s e-commerce platforms. You’ll work on APIs, integrations, and core backend services while mentoring peers and elevating engineering standards across the organization.



You will play a key role in shaping our API-first architecture, optimizing system performance, and ensuring our infrastructure scales globally. Beyond implementation, you will influence technical direction and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.



What You’ll Do

- Architect Our API-First Platform: Design, develop, and maintain a high-performance API layer that powers our headless commerce ecosystem. 

- Own Core Backend Services: Take end-to-end ownership of backend components—from system design and development to deployment and monitoring.

- Drive Platform Modernization: Lead the evolution of our legacy systems toward a clean, decoupled, API-first architecture, applying pragmatic engineering decisions over unnecessary complexity.

- Mentor and Elevate: Coach backend engineers on API design, performance optimization, and maintainable code practices.

- Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Partner with frontend engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to translate business objectives into robust API specifications.

- Champion Engineering Excellence: Advocate for modern development standards, including OpenAPI specifications, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and strong documentation practices.



What We’re Looking For

- Senior-Level Experience: 5+ years of professional backend development experience, with a strong emphasis on PHP.

- API-First Expertise: Proven experience building scalable RESTful or GraphQL APIs and designing headless architectures.

- PHP 8 Proficiency: Deep hands-on experience with modern PHP (PHP 8+), design patterns, and testing methodologies such as TDD. Experience with Symfony or similar frameworks is strongly preferred.

- Strategic & Pragmatic Thinking: Ability to balance refactoring versus rebuilding while navigating large-scale modernization initiatives.

- Strong Ownership Mentality: Proactive in identifying technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and architectural improvements.

- Database Mastery: Extensive experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB), including schema design, query optimization, and performance tuning in API-driven environments.

- Agile & Version Control: Experience working with Git and agile methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.

- AI-Accelerated Development: Comfortable leveraging AI tools to enhance productivity, code quality, and development velocity.



Nice to Have

- Experience in e-commerce or high-traffic consumer platforms.

- Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS or GCP) and containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).

- Experience with asynchronous processing or message queues (e.g., GCP Pub/Sub).



What We Offer

- Growth & Ownership: A high-performance culture where you gain responsibility early and accelerate your development, supported by AI-driven learning.

- International Environment: Collaborate with 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities across multiple countries.

- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-scaling, tech-driven company where your contributions directly influence product evolution.

- Collaborative Culture: Learn from experienced leaders and contribute to meaningful, high-impact projects.

- Celebration & Recognition: From team events and milestone celebrations to company-wide keynotes and awards, we recognize and celebrate achievements.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: B2B Sales Outreach Specialist for Europe (Email + Calls)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and communication-focused remote tea
mber from the Philippines to support our outreach to companies across Europe.



This is a long-term role. Depending on your language skills and overall fit, you may be assigned to one country, one language region, or a small group of European countries. Strong performers may later receive exclusive responsibility for a specific market.



Quick facts



Full-time

40 hours or more per week

Main working hours should follow European business time, between 8:00 AM and 5:00 PM Europe time

Saturday work is optional

Fixed pay: $1.75 per hour

Additional $25 commission for each supplier profile booked when you made a significant contribution to the conversion

1 paid trial day before long-term hiring



About Hortinex

Hortinex is an international B2B platform for the horticulture industry. Buyers can use the platform for free to view offers, compare prices, contact suppliers directly, and create tenders. Suppliers can book a paid supplier profile to professionally present their assortment and receive new business through direct buyer contact and matching tenders.



Your main tasks



Work through existing company leads in Europe

Write personalized outbound
s to companies

Handle follow-ups by phone and by additional

Document all contact attempts, responses, results, and next steps in a cloud-based Excel tracking file

Review leads and identify whether a company is more likely to be a potential buyer or supplier, either before outreach or during the conversation

Add missing lead information when needed, such as contact details or decision-maker information

Motivate companies to register on Hortinex as buyers or suppliers

Also ask buyers whether they are currently looking for certain products or suppliers

Use our guides, templates, and internal processes, but also personalize messages independently or with the help of AI tools when needed

Communicate professionally, clearly, and politely with European business contacts



What we provide



Your own business
 address

Your own phone number or calling setup

A cloud-based Excel file for full tracking

Clear guides, text frameworks, templates, and processes for fast and simple onboarding

Support when needed and room to grow if you perform well



Important

You do not need to build lead lists from scratch. Most leads are already available. Your job is to review them, contact them, send personalized messages, do follow-ups, and add missing information when needed.



Requirements



Strong and fluent English, both written and spoken

Willingness to make phone calls yourself

Experience in
 outreach, follow-up work, sales support, lead communication, or similar roles is a strong advantage

Strong writing skills

Organized and reliable way of working

Comfortable using Excel or similar tracking systems

Professional and friendly communication style

Ability to learn quickly from guides and processes

Willingness to use AI and translation tools when helpful



Big advantage



A strong second language in addition to English, such as German, Italian, French, Spanish, or another European language

Experience in B2B communication

Experience dealing with European companies

Experience in phone outreach or follow-up sales



What success looks like

During the first week, you will learn our workflow and systems. After that, suitable KPIs will be defined together. What matters most to us is that you work in a structured way, keep accurate records, and contribute to registrations and platform activity through strong communication.



How to apply

Please write the word HORTINEX in the first line of your application.

Also send:



a short introduction about yourself,

a 30 to 60 second English voice recording,

a short explanation of your experience with personalized
 outreach and phone follow-ups,

examples of similar work, if available.



If you speak excellent English, work in a structured way, and want a long-term outreach role with growth potential, we would love to hear from you.

title: Social Media Video Editor
description:
Own the content. Drive the growth. Shape the brand.



Role Overview:



If you know how to turn raw footage into addictive content…



If you understand what actually keeps people watching…



And if you want real ownership inside a fast-scaling brand—



This role is for you!



We’re a rapidly growing finance brand with 500,000+ YouTube subscribers, trusted for high-value, strategic content. As we scale, we’re doubling down on content performance and building an elite in-house editing team to match.



As our Social Media Editor, you won’t just “edit videos.” You’ll play a direct role in audience growth, retention, brand authority, and revenue.



This is a high-impact, execution-driven role for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments and wants to take full ownership of content production.





What You’ll Be Responsible For:



1. Editing & Content Production

- Edit 1–2 high-quality long-form YouTube videos weekly

- Produce 14+ short-form videos weekly (Shorts, Reels)

- Craft content optimized for:

   > Scroll-stopping hooks (first 1–3 seconds)

   > Retention and pacing

   > Watch time and engagement

   > Clean, compelling captions

   > Strong, consistent brand identity

- Enhance videos with dynamic captions, zooms, b-roll, sound design, and pacing that converts

- Continuously refine your editing style based on performance data



2. Content Mining & Strategy

- Turn long-form content into high-performing short-form clips

- Spot viral, emotional, and high-value 
nts

- Build platform-native content (not recycled cuts)

- Collaborate with leadership on content direction and growth strategy



3. Workflow & Ownership

- Own the entire editing pipeline and weekly production schedule

- Keep files, assets, and workflows clean and efficient

- Execute feedback quickly and accurately

- Communicate clearly with leadership and team

- Scale output without sacrificing quality

- Fully own the editing function end-to-end



4. What Success Looks Like

- Consistently hitting 1–2 long-form + 14+ short-form videos weekly

- Increasing retention, engagement, and performance metrics

- Fast turnaround times with minimal oversight

- Strong systems and workflows as content volume grows

- A clear, recognizable, and high-performing visual brand





Requirements



-   3+ years editing short-form social media content

-   3+ years editing long-form YouTube content

-   3+ years in social media video marketing

- Advanced proficiency in CapCut, After Effects, or Final Cut Pro

- Strong understanding of:

    > Hooks & retention psychology

    > Performance-driven editing

    > YouTube & Instagram analytics

    > Brand positioning

- Proven full-time editing experience (not casual or side freelance work)

- Strong portfolio (short-form + long-form)

-  Ability to commit fully to this role (no outside work)

-  Highly organized, detail-oriented, and efficient

-  Proven ability to handle consistent weekly output





Nice to Have:



- Experience with large YouTube or Instagram brands

- Background in finance, business, or educational content

- Experience working with influencers or authority-based creators

- Knowledge of YouTube growth strategy & analytics optimization

- To be considered, include the word “TAX” in your subject line.



How to Apply:



- Submit your most updated resume

- Share your portfolio (or best video work)

- Include a YouTube channel + links to videos you’ve edited 





If you’re looking for a role where your edits don’t just look good—but perform, scale, and drive real growth—we want to hear from you!!

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based, Process-Driven)



Job Overview



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: Customer Support Manager (E-commerce, Shopify) – Team Lead Role

We are scaling quickly and looking for someone to grow with us.



We are a fast growing e-commerce company operating multiple Shopify dropshipping stores in the US fashion market, and we are looking for a high level Customer Support Manager to take full ownership of our support operations.



This is not a basic support role. This is a leadership position where you are responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling our entire customer support system across multiple stores.



You will lead our current team of 2 support agents, ensure all KPIs are consistently met, and continuously improve performance, systems, and workflows. You will also work closely with suppliers to resolve order issues and prevent refunds, disputes, and chargebacks.



You are fully responsible for the performance of the support department. This includes response times, quality, refund control, and team productivity. You will monitor team performance daily, identify issues quickly, and take immediate action when needed.



Your focus is on speed, accuracy, and ownership. You take initiative, solve problems independently, and continuously improve the system without needing constant direction.



Your responsibilities include interviewing, hiring, and onboarding new customer support representatives, training and coaching agents to meet quality standards, and ensuring the team operates at a high level at all times.



Requirements:

Strong experience with Shopify is preferred

Highly organized, proactive, and performance driven

Available to start immediately

title: Amazon Compliance Specialist
description:
Regulatory & Legal Compliance



Conduct in-depth research on FDA, EPA, FTC, and other relevant federal and state regulations.

Ensure compliance with international product safety standards (EU, UK, Canada, Asia-Pacific) when applicable.

Perform ongoing monitoring of regulatory updates and interpret implications for product categories.

Support intellectual property due diligence to prevent patent, copyright, or trademark infringement.



Risk Management & Product Compliance



Evaluate new and existing products for compliance risks and advise stakeholders on mitigation strategies.

Develop compliance testing protocols and coordinate with third-party labs and certification agencies.

Manage corrective actions, recalls, or withdrawals in alignment with Amazon’s policies and legal requirements.

Conduct audits of product listings and seller submissions to prevent unlawful or restricted product selection.



Cross-Functional Collaboration



Partner with Product Development, Supply Chain, and Seller Performance teams to execute compliance initiatives.

Provide clear guidance to vendors, suppliers, and internal teams on compliance requirements.

Train cross-functional stakeholders on compliance best practices and emerging regulatory risks.

Act as a subject matter expert to business teams during product launches, regulatory reviews, and inspections.



Policy & Process Development



Draft and implement compliance procedures, standard operating protocols (SOPs), and escalation processes.

Support automation and system-based compliance controls to scale monitoring and enforcement.

Contribute to internal policy development regarding restricted products, product claims, and safety certifications.

Continuously improve workflows to enhance accuracy, timeliness, and audit readiness.



Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of compliance assessments, approvals, and regulatory correspondence.

Prepare detailed reports and risk assessments for leadership review.

Provide supervisors with regular feedback on task progress, emerging risks, and resolution status.

Ensure confidentiality of sensitive data, supplier information, and Amazon business strategy.





Experience interacting directly with regulators including federal and state agencies

Experience in research and analyzing federal and state regulations

Familiarity and experience in dealing with FDA regulation is REQUIRED

Familiarity with international compliance frameworks (REACH, RoHS, CE marking).

Experience in compliance auditing, regulatory affairs, or legal review.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills for engaging with global teams and regulators.

Ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment with strict deadline

3D experience is required for this role.
