title: AI & Operations Assistant — Political Strategy Firm
description:
DO YOU WORK BEST INDEPENDENTLY, TAKE INITIATIVE, AND WANT REAL OPERATIONAL MANAGEMENT EXPERIENCE?

Work directly with an experienced American political strategist who is genuinely invested in your growth.

Build real, marketable skills in AI, digital marketing, SEO, political research, and operations management.



THIS JOB IS DIFFERENT

You’ll use Claude, Gemini, Google AI Studio, and NotebookLM as everyday professional tools. You don’t need to arrive knowing everything. You need to be curious, resourceful, and the kind of person who likes to figure things out.



AREAS OF RESPONSIBILITY

AI Tools and Knowledge Management

Organize AI research systems, help set up workflows in Google Workspace and with AI agents, build prompt libraries, and stay current on new AI features and bring them to our work.



SEO and Website

Competitive research, keyword updates, and website improvements using AI tools. No prior SEO experience required — if you know how to use AI, you can learn this quickly.



Business Development and Research

Research political markets, monitor political candidate announcements, build prospect lists, and research competitors. You’ll help identify where we should be growing.



Candidate and Client Research

Research political candidates — their backgrounds, opponents, issues, and online presence. Communicate with clients on data and project needs.



Digital Advertising

Learn our digital advertising platform and help coordinate campaigns across social, streaming, and programmatic channels.



AI Automation and Agents

Learn how we use automation tools to streamline candidate research and data workflows. Interest in AI agents is a plus.



Operations and Administration Management

Maintain a master task list for all active projects, handle invoicing and billing, supervise a small staff, and keep Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, and Sheets) organized.

THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF

You follow AI news and new tool releases on your own time — genuinely.

You LIKE figuring things out on your own.

You keep things organized without being reminded.

You’re interested in U.S. politics or willing to learn about it.

You want to build skills in AI, marketing, and operations that will serve you for years.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

You need a predictable, rigid schedule.

You prefer to wait for direction rather than take initiative.

You’re not genuinely curious about AI and new technologies.



COMPENSATION

$6–$7 USD per hour, depending on experience

30–40 hours per week

Hours increase during peak election months

Profit-sharing bonus in addition to the hourly rate

Professional AI tool subscriptions provided



QUALIFICATIONS

Excellent English, spoken and written

Strong Google Sheets, Docs, and Drive skills; full Google Workspace experience a plus

Demonstrated experience with AI tools used in real work — you’ve gone beyond basic prompting and actually organized, customized, or built something with AI

CRM and SEO experience helpful but not required

Available approximately 2–11 AM Philippine Time

Able to commit through November 2026, with the possibility to continue

Recent graduates welcome. Demonstrated AI curiosity and strong English matter more than years of experience.



ABOUT PRECISION POLITICS

U.S.-based Democratic political strategy and advertising firm. 400-plus campaign wins. 94% win rate. 24 National POLLIE Awards. You’ll work directly with the firm’s owner, a nationally recognized strategist and former Chief of Staff to a U.S. mayor.

HOW TO APPLY

Begin your message with the word "Operations" — this confirms that you read the posting and can follow directions.

Attach your resume and include a cover letter:

Why does this role interest you?

Why are you qualified for this position?

Which AI tools do you use, and what have you built or organized with them?

What is the most recent AI feature or tool you discovered on your own?

Can you work between 2–11 AM Philippine Time on a regular basis?

English writing and editing

AI prompting and data extraction

Google Sheets and data cleaning

title: Systems & Automation Specialist
description:
SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION SPECIALIST

Full-Time | Remote | Hours: 9:00am - 5:00pm CST (Non-Negotiable)





ABOUT US



We're a fast-growing digital marketing agency managing 150+ active clients across SEO, paid ads, and website services. Our team is lean, remote-first, and moves fast. We don't have room for people who need hand-holding — but we absolutely take care of the people who show up and deliver.





THE ROLE



We're looking for a Marketing Operations & Automation Specialist who lives in the intersection of systems, websites, and data. You'll be the person who keeps our tech stack humming — building workflows, launching sites correctly, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks operationally.



This is not a creative role. This is an execution role for someone who genuinely enjoys making things work and has a strong attention to detail.





WHAT YOU'LL OWN



- Building, managing, and optimizing automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) and Zapier

- Supporting website builds and updates in WordPress using Elementor

- Setting up and verifying Google Tag Manager containers and triggers for new site launches

- Configuring Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and ensuring proper tracking is in place before sites go live

- Coordinating pre-launch checklists to ensure every client site is technically sound

- Identifying broken workflows or tracking gaps and fixing them proactively





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Proven, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel — workflows, pipelines, automations, and review tools

- Strong Zapier skills — you know how to connect platforms cleanly and troubleshoot when Zaps break

- Comfortable working in WordPress and Elementor — not a developer, but not afraid of the backend either

- Working knowledge of Google Tag Manager and GA4 setup and configuration

- Detail-oriented — you check your work before handing it off

- Reliable, communicative, and self-directed during your shift

- Excellent written English





REQUIREMENTS



- Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in a marketing ops or automation role

- Must be available and actively working 9:00am - 5:00pm CST, Monday through Friday — this is a firm requirement, not flexible

- Stable internet connection and a professional remote setup

- Please include the word "Workflow" at the start of your application so we know you read this carefully





COMPENSATION



Competitive and based on experience. Long-term position with room to grow as the agency scales.





**If you've used GHL to build an automation you're proud of, tell us about it in your application. That's the kind of detail that gets you an interview.

Your main goal is to engage, follow up, and convert leads into paying patients. If you enjoy chatting with customers, closing sales, and being rewarded for performance, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

1. Lead Engagement

? - Respond to Whatsapp and other online enquiries promptly (within 5–15 minutes)

? - Understand customer concerns and recommend suitable solutions

2. Sales Conversion

? - Guide potential patients toward booking a consultation

? - Handle objections (pricing, concerns, hesitation) confidently

? - Follow structured sales scripts and frameworks

3. Follow-Up & Nurturing

? - Proactively follow up with leads (Day 1, Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, etc.)

? - Maintain consistent communication until conversion or closure

4. Appointment Booking

? - Offer and secure consultation slots

? - Coordinate with clinic schedules

5. Lead Tracking

? - Update lead status in CRM or tracking sheets

? - Ensure proper tagging and documentation



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

? - Strong communication skills (clear, friendly, persuasive)

? - Sales-driven mindset (comfortable closing conversations)

? - Fast typing and ability to handle multiple chats

? - Responsible, disciplined, and able to work remotely



Good to Have

? - Experience in sales, customer service, or aesthetics industry

? - Experience handling WhatsApp / online enquiries

? - Familiarity with beauty or aesthetic treatments



Key Traits for Success

? - Proactive (you follow up, not wait)

? - Persuasive but not pushy

? - Organised and detail-oriented

? - Comfortable working with targets and KPIs



Compensation & Benefits:  

- Competitive base salary of 550USD - 650USD

- Performance-based incentives of 10 USD per lead that attend clinic session



? Remote working flexibility

? - Training and structured scripts provided



Performance Expectations

You will be measured on:

? - Response time

? - Booking conversion rate

? - Show-up rate

? - Revenue generated from leads



Why Join Us?

? - Be part of a growing aesthetic clinic group

? - Clear system and training provided

? - High earning potential with incentives

? - Opportunity to grow into senior sales or team lead roles



How to Apply

Please submit your resume along with a short message explaining why you are suitable for this role.



Note:

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Candidates with strong sales ability will be prioritised.

title: Full-Stack Software Engineer, AI Infrastructure & Automation
description:
## About the Role



We're looking for a Full-Stack Software Engineer with deep expertise in AI tooling and automation infrastructure to join our team. You'll own the full stack — from front-end interfaces to backend services — while designing and operating the intelligent automation systems that power our workflows. This isn't a role where you wait for specs. You identify what needs to be built, architect it, and ship it.



## What You'll Do



- Build and maintain full-stack applications across front-end (React, modern JS/TS frameworks) and backend (Node.js, Python, APIs, databases)

- Design, deploy, and optimize AI infrastructure including LLM gateways, model routing, and cost-efficient multi-provider strategies (e.g., OpenClaw, OpenRouter, APIs)

- Build automation pipelines that ingest, process, and transform data across systems — content pipelines, CRM integrations, communication platforms

- Evaluate, integrate, and master emerging AI tools and APIs, staying ahead of what's possible and making it practical

- Own DevOps and infrastructure: VPS management, service deployment, DNS/SSL, CI/CD, and monitoring

- Architect systems for reliability — designing fallback chains, proxy strategies, and self-healing workflows

- Collaborate directly with leadership to translate business needs into technical solutions, fast



## What You Bring



- **5+ years of professional software engineering experience**, predominantly in startup or high-autonomy environments

- **Strong full-stack skills**: production experience with modern front-end frameworks and backend/API development

- **Hands-on AI infrastructure experience**: you've worked with LLM APIs, AI gateways, prompt engineering, model routing, or similar systems — not just consumed AI, but built the plumbing around it

- **Automation mindset**: you've designed and deployed workflow automation — data pipelines, integration scripts, bot frameworks, or orchestration systems

- **Self-starter DNA**: you thrive with minimal direction, take ownership of problems end-to-end, and ship without waiting for permission

- **Linux/DevOps proficiency**: comfortable with VPS administration, shell scripting, service management, networking, and debugging production systems

- **Strong debugging instinct**: you verify ground truth directly rather than trusting assumptions — you read the config, inspect the logs, test the endpoint



## Nice to Have



- Experience with AI agent frameworks and bot platforms (
,
)

- Familiarity with video/content ingestion pipelines (YouTube APIs, transcript extraction, media processing)

- CRM and telephony integration experience (Salesmate, RingCentral, or similar)

- Background in cost optimization for LLM usage across multiple providers

- Experience with headless browser automation and proxy infrastructure



## Why This Role



This is a high-impact, high-autonomy position where you'll shape how AI and automation are woven into everything we do. If you're the kind of engineer who builds their own tools, automates their own workflows, and treats AI as infrastructure rather than a novelty — we want to talk.

Essential

 Jobs, and/or OnlineJobs.ph

, video)

title: JavaScript Developer (Data-Driven Static Site)
description:
# About the Role

We are looking for a talented and curious remote JavaScript developer to build a modern, interactive data-driven website. You will be taking a complex data prototype and architecting it into a full-featured, performant static site.



This role is perfect for a developer who is passionate about building exceptional user interfaces, loves the speed and security of the modern static web, and excels at learning new frameworks and technologies quickly.



# What You'll Be Doing

* Lead the development of a data-rich static site, transforming a prototype into a production-ready application.

* Work with a modern, file-based JavaScript framework to create interactive charts, maps, and data tables.

* Implement a clean, component-based architecture for the project.

* Ensure the final application is highly performant, responsive, and maintainable.

* Collaborate with our team to define project goals and technical strategy.



Key Qualifications

* Expert in Modern [removed] Deep proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+), including asynchronous patterns, modules, and data structures.

* Strong Static Site Generator (SSG) Experience: You have hands-on experience building sites with one or more SSGs (e.g., Next.js, Eleventy, Astro, Hugo) and a solid understanding of the principles behind them.

* A Passion for UI/UX: You have a strong interest in turning complex data and requirements into beautiful, intuitive, and interactive user interfaces.

* Fast Learner: You have a demonstrated ability to learn new frameworks and libraries quickly and effectively. You see a new toolset as an exciting challenge, not an obstacle.

* Git & Modern Workflows: You are completely comfortable with Git, including branching, pull requests, and code reviews.

* AI-Enhanced Productivity: You are proficient in using AI code assistants (Gemini, GitHub Copilot, etc.) to enhance your workflow.



# Bonus Points (Nice to Have):

* Direct experience with a JavaScript data visualization library like D3.js, Observable Plot, Vega-Lite, or ECharts.

* Familiarity with reactive programming concepts (found in libraries like Svelte, Vue, or RxJS).

* Experience with data-wrangling and preparation in JavaScript.



# How to Apply

To apply, please send your resume and a link to your GitHub profile or portfolio.



To ensure your application is considered, please also include a short answer to the following question in your application: Tell us about an interactive web UI or data visualization you've seen recently that impressed you, and why. What made it effective or interesting from a technical or design perspective? Please include a link if possible.

title: LONG TERM Virtual Customer Experience Officer (Receptionist, Admin + Project Work)
description:
Virtual Receptionist / Administrator 

Full-time (20-30hrs/week) | $5-10 AUD/hour | Sydney AEST Hours | Long-Term Role



We are hiring a confident, caring, and detail-oriented Virtual Customer Experience Officer to support two thriving Australian Businesses:



Carte Blanche Hair – a luxury salon delivering exquisite, high-touch experiences for self-expressed clients

Fixio Physiotherapy – a progressive clinic offering intelligent, empathetic care with clinical excellence



We are seeking a Virtual Receptionist / Administrator to become a long-term part of our operations team. This is a key role where you are the front line; the voice, the organiser, and the calm hand that ensures our client journey is flawless. You will support our in-salon and in-clinic teams by keeping bookings smooth, clients, informed, and back-end tasks running efficiently.

It is best suited to someone who values structure, consistency, and professional growth in a stable remote role. It also requires uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours so we prefer applicants with minimal personal obligations during work time.



About the Role



This position combines front-line receptionist duties, administrative support, and light project management. You will be a key point of contact for our clients and an essential support for our internal team. You will be working closely with the business owners and 1–2 other admin team members in a professional, fast-paced environment.



3 Key Components of the Role



1. Receptionist Duties

You will be responsible for managing two phone lines throughout your shift.

Answering and making calls using DialPad

Booking and managing appointments via Fresha (Salon) and Cliniko (Clinic)

Responding to phone, SMS, and email enquiries with clarity, warmth, and confidence

Guiding clients toward the correct services and practitioners

Maintaining a calm, professional tone at all times



2. Administration

Inbox and email management

Calendar coordination and scheduling

Data entry and record management

Strong daily use of Google Workspace

Team communication via Slack, WhatsApp, and Outlook

Handling sensitive client and HR information with discretion and confidentiality

Reporting directly to the business owners



3. Project Management (Ad Hoc)

Supporting operational projects as needed

Creating or improving internal resources

Identifying efficiencies in workflows and systems

Assisting with the creation of policies and procedures

Taking initiative and thinking critically without constant supervision



We are looking for someone who is:



A confident and kind communicator with a clear phone manner

Experienced in reception, admin, or client-facing roles (bonus if in hair/healthcare)

Fluent in English with strong conversational, writing, and spelling skills

Highly competent with Google workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Gmail, etc.)

Comfortable learning and navigating systems like Fresha, Cliniko, Cliniqflows, and DialPad

Emotionally Intelligent, organised, and able to multitask

A proactive team player who values both excellence and warmth



Work Requirements



Must be available during Sydney (AEST) Timezone. You will need to be available for ALL of the hours below:

Monday to Friday at 8:00am – 6:00pm AEST

Saturday at 8:00am – 3:00pm AEST

Starting at 20 hours per week (with potential to grow to 30+ hours per week)

Flexibility to cover other shifts when required

Stable internet connection (backup preferred)

Reliable power supply

Professional, quiet work setup

Ability to remain online and responsive throughout the shift



What We Offer



Stable, long-term remote role

Clear expectations and structured workflows

Supportive team environment

Work with premium, established Australian brands

Potential for career growth into a leadership/practice manager role encompassing invoicing, billing, additional project work, and training of other team members. 

Contract & Compensation

Rate: $5-10 AUD/hour (This will depend on experience and proficiency in required skills)

Initial 3-month Trial Contract

Role begins within 1 week with training to start

Long-term role with increasing hours and potential to grow full-time



**Please note that no other work is permitted during rostered hours due to workload. This role requires consistent daily presence and uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours. Please apply only if this aligns with your current lifestyle and work environment.**



How to Apply



All applications must be submitted exclusively via our Google Form. We do not accept applications or CVs through OnlineJobs.ph messages.

To apply:

Carefully read the role description to ensure it aligns with your availability, work environment, and long-term goals

Complete the Google Form in full, providing clear and thoughtful responses

Access the Link Here: forms.gle/MiXbTpuNRiP1ktWo8

Only applications submitted through the Google Form will be reviewed. Incomplete or rushed responses will not be considered. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage, which may include a trial task.

title: Sales Virtual Assistant / Appointment Setter
description:
**Important – Read This Job Post Carefully**



We are a fast-growing home service company based in California looking to hire a reliable and motivated Virtual Assistant to help manage incoming leads, customer communication, outbound calls, and appointment scheduling.



Our industry is extremely competitive. Customers often contact multiple companies at the same time, and the company that responds first and communicates most professionally usually wins the job.



Because of this, speed, persistence, and professionalism are extremely important.



Your role will be to contact new leads, communicate with customers, follow up on previous inquiries, and schedule technician appointments.



You will also assist with basic data entry and updating customer information inside our CRM system.



You do not need previous experience with our software, as we will train you on how to use our CRM, call system, and internal tools.



This position is ideal for someone who is comfortable speaking with customers, organized, and able to work in a fast-paced environment.





Please read this job post in its entirety before applying.



This position requires attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully.



Applications that do not follow the instructions outlined in this post will not be reviewed.



ABSOLUTE REQUIREMENTS (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet these requirements.



We will not review applications that do not meet them.



Applicants must have:



• Strong and reliable internet connection (strong WiFi)

• Backup power in case of power outages

• Excellent English speaking ability with minimal accent

• Quiet and dedicated workspace (no background noise)

• Professional quality headset for customer calls



Strongly recommended:



• Dual monitor setup (two screens) to efficiently manage calls and CRM tasks.



Voice Recording Requirement (MANDATORY)



This role requires speaking with customers on the phone throughout the day.



Because of this, all applicants must submit a voice recording reading the script below.



This recording allows us to evaluate:



• English fluency

• Accent clarity

• Professional tone

• Communication ability



Any application submitted without a voice recording will NOT be reviewed or considered.



Please record yourself reading the script below clearly and naturally, as if you are leaving a voi
 for a real customer.



Record in a quiet environment using your headset.



Voice Recording Script



Please read the following message exactly as written:



Hello, this is (insert your name) calling with Professional Garage Door Services.



Our phone number is
, that’s
.



The reason I’m calling is because you recently submitted an inquiry regarding garage door assistance, and we would like to learn a little more about the issue you are experiencing and how we can help.



Our company specializes in garage door repairs, maintenance, and new garage door installations, and our technicians are equipped to handle most issues the same day.



At the 
nt, we actually have a technician working in your area, and because of that we may be able to provide same-day service depending on availability.



What we normally do is send one of our technicians out to perform a quick inspection of the garage door system, identify the issue, and provide you with a free, no-obligation estimate before any work is done.



During the inspection, the technician may also check torsion springs, track alignment, reinforcement struts, roller assemblies, cable tension, opener limits, and the safety sensor system to determine the exact cause of the problem.



The inspection typically only takes a few minutes and it allows our technician to explain exactly what is going on with the door and what options are available for repair or replacement.



If you would like to schedule a visit from one of our technicians, please give us a call at
, and we will be happy to get that arranged for you.



Once again, that phone number is
.



Thank you very much for your time, and we look forward to assisting you. Have a great day.



Scope of Work



Your responsibilities will include:



• Data entry and updating customer information in our CRM

• Placing outbound calls to new leads

• Following up with previous customers

• Scheduling technician appointments

• Sending text messages and
s to customers

• Updating lead notes and tracking communication history

• Coordinating with our internal team



You will be trained on how to use our CRM, dialing systems, and internal tools.



Work Schedule



This position requires working during U.S. daytime hours, which is night shift in the Philippines.



Shifts are 9 hours in length and will fall between the hours of:



7:00 AM – 9:00 PM PST



Exact shifts will be assigned during the hiring process.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



• Is comfortable speaking with customers on the phone

• Has strong communication skills

• Is organized and detail-oriented

• Can follow instructions carefully

• Works well in a fast-paced environment

• Is reliable and punctual



Compensation



The starting rate for this position is $5 per hour.



That said, we actively reward performance—if you show excellent English, strong communication, and the ability to perform effectively in your role, we can increase your pay to $6 per hour.



We’re also building a long-term team, and there will be opportunities to grow into management positions.



If you demonstrate initiative, leadership qualities, and responsibility, you’ll have the chance to move up and take on a larger role within the company..



Tea
mbers who show strong communication skills, reliability, and the ability to consistently perform in this fast-paced environment will be considered for raises over time.



This position is intended to be a long-term role for the right candidate.



Application Instruction



To confirm that you carefully read the entire job description, please start your application with the word:



Technician



*Applications that do not include this word at the beginning will not be reviewed!*

title: SEO Specialist
description:

As an SEO Specialist, you will be responsible for optimizing our website and digital content to improve search engine rankings, drive organic traffic, and enhance overall visibility. You will work closely with the marketing team to implement effective SEO strategies and stay up to date with the latest industry trends.

Stay updated with search engine algorithm changes and best practices

title: Video Editor & Motion Designer
description:
We are building a next-generation documentary content studio powered by AI, cinematic storytelling, and high-impact visuals.



We are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor & Motion Designer who can transform scripts into engaging, cinematic documentary-style videos using a mix of AI tools, stock footage, motion graphics, and light 3D elements.



This is not a basic editing role. We are looking for someone who understands pacing, storytelling, and visual impact.



???? Responsibilities

Turn scripts into fully produced documentary-style videos (5–20 minutes)

Source and integrate:

Stock footage

AI-generated visuals

Motion graphics and animations

Create cinematic sequences using:

Text animation

UI simulations (maps, chats, dark web style visuals)

Transitions and effects

Use AI tools to generate and enhance visuals

Sync visuals perfectly with voiceover and storytelling flow

Apply professional color grading, sound design, and pacing

Maintain high retention through dynamic editing and scene variation

????? Required Skills

Strong experience in video editing (Premiere Pro / DaVinci Resolve)

Advanced skills in Adobe After Effects

Experience using AI tools such as:

Runway ML

Pika Labs



Ability to create motion graphics (text, UI, maps, overlays)

Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, and viewer psychology

Experience with stock footage platforms (Envato, Artgrid, Storyblocks)

Experience with AI image generation (Midjourney / Stable Diffusion)

Sound design experience (music + effects for tension)

Experience editing documentary or YouTube storytelling content



???? What We Are NOT Looking For

Basic editors who only cut clips

Template-only editors with no creativity

People who rely fully on AI without understanding storytelling



???? What Success Looks Like

Videos that feel cinematic, engaging, and professional

High audience retention (fast pacing, no boring sections)

Strong visual storytelling that keeps viewers watching

title: Home-based Video Data Contributor (Part-time)
description:
Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.



Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.



???? Help Shape the Future of Robotics & Earn Income



We are looking for paid participants to record videos of everyday activities while wearing a head-mounted camera. Your recordings will help robotics systems learn to perceive, understand, and interact with real-world environments.



You’ll record yourself doing tasks you already do in daily life, such as:



-Folding laundry

-Preparing or cooking food

-Cleaning, tidying, or organizing items

-Rearranging or sorting objects

-Participants may or may not be assigned specific tasks, depending on project needs.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable performing everyday tasks, and want to earn additional income while contributing to cutting-edge robotics research, we’d love to work with you!



???? What to Expect:



Weekly footage goal: Capture at least 10 hours of clear, intentional arm, hand, and finger movements interacting with objects (e.g., folding clothes, using a screwdriver). Avoid low-value activities such as typing, using your phone, or sitting idle.



Uploads & quality checks: Upload videos to Google Drive on time, perform basic quality checks, and track your daily filming progress.



Compensation: Paid based on total usable footage 

Unusable footage includes: Dark videos, footage showing only fingers (not full hands and arms), idle activities (watching TV, using phone, driving), or videos capturing personal information.

Project duration: Month-to-month, giving you flexibility.

Film as much high-quality, task-specific footage as you want—earn extra income while completing everyday tasks!



???? Simple Assessment

As part of the application process, candidates are asked to complete a short video task:



Record a 2-minute video of a simple task (e.g., folding clothes, cleaning, or organizing) using your phone’s wide camera (0.5x) at 1080p / 30 FPS. Do not show your face and no voice is required.Please make sure there is good lighting and keep your hands visible.You will be asked to provide the Google Drive link in the screening question—make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view.”



This assessment helps us confirm filming quality, attention to instructions, and ability to upload videos correctly.



???? Day in the Life

Wear your phone via a head strap.

Film tasks following best practices.

Ensure successful recordings before uploading to Drive.

Get paid!



Example tasks:



-Picking up, placing, and organizing objects

-Sorting items by size, color, or category

-Using simple tools (screwdriver, cloth, utensils)

-Cleaning or wiping surfaces

-Assembling/disassembling simple objects

-Reaching and placing objects at varying distances

Sample footage: 



?? Compliance & Participation Requirements



To ensure project success, participants are expected to:



Meet the required filming hours.

Follow all submission guidelines.

We encourage open communication if you encounter challenges, so we can provide support. Repeated failure to meet requirements without a valid and communicated reason may result in termination of participation and contract.



??????? Who You Are



Own a smartphone with a wide camera (0.5x zoom) capable of 1080p/30 FPS

Have access to a computer or laptop and a stable internet connection to upload videos to Google Drive

Able to follow detailed instructions carefully

Comfortable performing light physical tasks (standing, reaching, grasping objects)

Able to move naturally, slowly, and deliberately during recordings

Knowledgeable in uploading, organizing, and managing video files on Google Drive

???? Compensation

$2 USD/hour for the first 10 hours (initial period)

$3 USD/hour for all subsequent approved footage that meets quality standards



???? Bonuses



$10 USD headgear reimbursement upon completion of the first 10 hours (regardless of approval)

$10 USD one-time bonus upon completion of the next 10 hours of approved footage

$20 USD one-time bonus upon reaching 50 hours of approved footage within the first month



???? Payment Terms



Compensation is based solely on approved and qualified footage

Payments are processed via Deel on a monthly basis and released at the end of each month

Footage must be submitted and approved within the applicable payout cycle to be included in that month’s payment

Participants whose start date falls on or after the second week of the month will receive their first payment in the subsequent month’s payout cycle



???? Who Can Apply:



We value participants from all backgrounds. All qualified candidates will be considered regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, age, or veteran status.



Even if you’re unsure whether you meet every requirement, we encourage you to apply!

title: LinkedIn Content Strategist
description:
This is a One-Time Consulting Engagement with Quarterly Evaluations.



Overview

We're seeking a LinkedIn Content Strategist to build a structured, repeatable content system that translates our brand identity into consistent authority-building messaging designed to maintain and grow brand awareness, and attract passive real estate investors to our investment opportunities.



This is a strategic advisory engagement: you define direction and strategy; we execute and implement; we reconvene quarterly to review performance and refine approach.



We handle content writing, posting, and day-to-day execution internally. You own the blueprint.



What We Already Have

• Core Identity: Calm operator, disciplined allocator, long-term thinker, thought leader

• Tone: Calm, measured, direct, clear, confident without hype

• Audience: High-income professionals (W2/business owners), operators, sophisticated investors

• Objective: Build brand awareness and attract passive real estate investors through story-driven content that demonstrates disciplined investing philosophy, market insight, and track record

• Positioning: Structured, selective, disciplined, focused on downside protection, measured under pressure

• Writing Standards: First-person ("I"), under 250 words, short paragraphs, clean spacing, plain language (no jargon, no academic tone), no emojis, no hard CTAs



Your Responsibilities

1. Content Strategy & Direction

• Transform our existing brand, tone, and audience into a clear, structured content direction

• Define content pillars (what we talk about) and content themes (monthly/quarterly focus areas)

• Establish content angles and narrative approaches for each topic

• Ensure all strategy aligns with our positioning and resonates with our target audience

2. Content System & Planning

• Build month-by-month content plans with specific post ideas and angles (not full writing)

• Develop post frameworks that guide storytelling structure, hooks, and flow

• Create format guidance: when to use text-only vs. carousel, visual presentation standards

• Establish content repurposing principles to extend high-performing ideas across multiple formats

• Design a repeatable system that removes guesswork and ensures consistency

3. Performance Guidance

• Define key metrics to track: engagement, reach, inbound investor inquiries, content patterns that attract qualified passive investors

• Recommend evaluation frameworks to assess how content drives investor awareness and interest

• Provide best practices and reference examples from real estate investment and operator communities

• Build a foundation for ongoing optimization that keeps content focused on investor attraction



Engagement Model

Phase 1 – Initial Strategy

• Discovery and alignment on brand, audience, and objectives

• Deliver complete content strategy, pillars, frameworks, and first month plan

• Handoff: detailed documentation and system for internal execution

Phase 2 – Quarterly Reviews 

• We implement and execute; you advise quarterly

• Review performance, refine strategy, adjust themes and angles as needed

• Quarterly check-ins to keep content system sharp and responsive to market/audience shifts



Final Deliverables (Initial Engagement)

• Content pillars and themes

• 3-month rolling content plans (topics + angles)

• Post frameworks and structure guidelines

• Content system and process documentation

• Performance metrics and optimization guidance



Ideal Candidate

• Proven LinkedIn content strategy experience (strategy, direction, and planning—not limited to writing/posting)

• Personal branding expertise for investors, operators, or founders in high-net-worth communities

• Deep knowledge of real estate investment and capital raising dynamics—you understand what attracts passive investors

• Systems thinker who translates strategy into clear, actionable frameworks

• Deep understanding of LinkedIn dynamics and authority-building mechanics that drive investor interest

• Strategic clarity: ability to craft narratives that position a firm as disciplined, selective, and trustworthy

Why Work With Us

title: People & Culture Leader
description:
If you run HR by waiting to be told what to do, this is not for you. We need someone who walks into ambiguity and builds order.



About the Role

Aureus Financial is a multi-division financial services and education group serving seven and eight-figure business owners across Australia. We have a team of 65-plus people across education, wealth advice, accounting, mortgage broking, and property. We move fast, hold high standards, and we are scaling.



We have split our HR function into internal and external. This role owns internal HR completely. Within 30 to 60 days of you starting, you will hire a People & Culture Coordinator who handles execution. Your job is to build the system, lead that person, and partner with our department heads to embed performance culture across the business.



Performance management at Aureus is a collaboration. You design the framework and the cadence. Department heads run the conversations with their teams. You hold them accountable to the schedule and the standard. This is the model — you need to be able to build it and make it stick without being heavy-handed.



Why This Role Is Worth Your Time

You will own the entire internal HR function — full design authority, no one telling you how to structure it.

You will hire and lead your own direct report within 60 days — this is a people leadership role, not a solo operator role.

Direct access to the CEO and Group Operations Leader from day one.

You will build the performance infrastructure for a growing business and get to see it work at scale.

PHP 100,
,000 per month, based on experience + performance bonus



What You Will Own

Pillar 1 — Team Leadership & HR Systems

Hire and lead a People & Culture Coordinator within your first 60 days

Design every HR process so it is a documented, repeatable system your Coordinator can run

Own compliance across all HR platforms and employment documentation



Pillar 2 — Talent Acquisition & Performance Framework

Accountable for all hiring outcomes — your Coordinator handles execution, you set the standard

Build the monthly performance review framework and partner with department heads to run it — they own the conversations, you own the system

Design KPI scorecards for every role and train department heads to use them



Pillar 3 — Culture & Strategic Leadership

Engagement initiatives measured by retention and satisfaction scores — not activity

Workforce planning and succession with the executive team

Act as trusted advisor to department heads on people challenges



How We Measure Success

P&C Coordinator hired and operating within 60 days

Monthly performance review cycle running across all divisions with department heads facilitating

Roles filled in under 30 days, every time

Friday Self Assessment completion above 90% with weekly trend reports actioned

Zero employment compliance breaches

Employee satisfaction above 4 out of 5 on quarterly surveys



This Role Is For You If

You have led HR in a 65+ person, multi-entity, fast-moving environment and thrived without hand-holding

You have built HR frameworks from scratch and then trained others to run them

You are comfortable influencing department heads who do not report to you

You know how to hire well — and can build a process that finds A-players consistently

You measure your work by business outcomes: retention, review completion, time-to-fill — not activity



This Role Is NOT For You If

You want to be the one running every review, handling every HR ticket, and staying in execution permanently

You have not been a HR leader in a 65+ person organization

You struggle to influence stakeholders who do not report to you

You have never led or managed a direct report

You have only maintained HR systems — never designed one from the ground up

You need to be told what to work on each week



Base Salary: PHP 100,
,000php per month + bonus

Work Style: Fully remote

Hours: Aligned to Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Reports To: Group Operations Leader



We use VideoAsk for initial screening. Do not send a CV
.

You will be asked to complete a short async video screening (6 questions, approximately 15 minutes). Instructions will be sent after you express interest via our careers page or the link provided. 

Applications without a completed VideoAsk will not be reviewed.

Why Join Smartland?



Competitive pay with room for growth

Valuable experience in U.S. real estate property management



Long-term career advancement opportunities

title: Short-Form Video Editor / Content Clipper (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

???? JOB TITLE



Short-Form Video Editor / Content Clipper (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)



?

?

?

?



CONTACT







?



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are hiring multiple Short-Form Video Editors (Clippers) to produce high-performing content for social media.



Your job is simple:

Take raw content and turn it into engaging, fast-paced, attention-grabbing videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



This is a performance-driven role. We are not looking for basic editors—we want people who understand viral content and can produce videos that keep attention and drive views.

?

    •    Follow viral content styles and trends

    •    Deliver multiple videos daily or weekly (based on workload)

    •    Organize and label files properly

    •    Meet deadlines consistently



?



IMPORTANT (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



This is a volume + performance role.



You are expected to:

    •    Produce content quickly

    •    Follow instructions and style guidelines

    •    Improve based on feedback



This is NOT a role for slow editors or perfectionists who take hours on one video.



?



REQUIRED SKILLS

    •    Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, and retention

    •    Ability to add engaging captions and subtitles

    •    Fast turnaround time

    •    Reliable and responsive



?



BONUS SKILLS (STRONG PLUS)

    •    Experience working with creators or personal brands



?



PAY STRUCTURE (IMPORTANT)

    •    $3 – $10 per video (based on quality)



Option 2 (After proving performance):

    •    Base pay + performance bonuses

    •    Bonuses for high-performing videos (views, engagement)



???? Top performers will get consistent work and higher pay.



?



WORKLOAD EXPECTATION

    •    3–10 videos per day (depending on capacity)

    •    Must be able to handle volume



?



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (FILTER OUT WEAK EDITORS)



To apply:

    1.    Send 3–5 videos you have edited (short-form ONLY)

    2.    Include BEFORE & AFTER if possible

    3.    Record a short Loom (2 minutes):

    •    Explain your editing style

    •    What makes a video go viral

    4.    Subject line: “BMF Clipper”

    5.    Send to: [your
]



?



TEST TASK (REQUIRED)



If selected, you will be given a short sample clip to edit.



We are looking for:

    •    Strong hook

    •    Clean captions

    •    Good pacing

    •    Attention retention



?



DESIRED QUALITIES

    •    Fast and efficient

    •    Takes feedback well

    •    Consistent and reliable

    •    Understands viral content (not just editing)

    •    Hungry for growth



?



???? INSTANT DISQUALIFIERS

    •    Slow turnaround

    •    No understanding of hooks

    •    Over-editing / messy visuals

    •    Doesn’t follow instructions

    •    Misses deadlines

title: Sr. Graphic Designer
description:
We are a growing marketing agency seeking a full-time Sr. Graphic Designer to join our team for 40 hours per week. This role is ideal for a creative, reliable, and detail-oriented designer who can produce strong digital and print work, manage deadlines independently, and support a variety of client brands.



This position is primarily focused on graphic design, including social media graphics, marketing materials, ad creative, branded collateral, and simple animated ads using motion and video assets. Candidates should be comfortable creating light animation and video-based ad creative for digital campaigns. Basic familiarity with web design and preparing assets for digital use is also helpful.



We are looking for someone who is self-motivated, organized, and able to think through projects carefully rather than simply check boxes. The right candidate should have a strong eye for design, understand brand consistency, and be able to work efficiently across multiple projects.



Responsibilities:



 -   Create social media graphics for a variety of client accounts

 -   Design digital marketing materials including ad creative, newsletter graphics, promotional assets, and branded content

 -   Design print materials such as flyers, postcards, business cards, signage, and other collateral

 -   Develop layouts and creative concepts that align with each client’s brand standards and goals

 -   Resize, adapt, and version designs across platforms and formats

 -   Retouch and edit photos as needed

 -   Prepare final files for both digital and print use

 -   Create infographics, icons, illustrations, and other supporting visual assets when needed

 -   Collaborate with tea
mbers on creative direction, revisions, and project execution

 -   Manage assigned tasks independently in ClickUp and provide regular project updates

 -   Meet deadlines consistently and communicate proactively if questions or issues arise

 -   Basic motion or animated graphics support is a plus





Requirements:



-   3+ years of professional graphic design experience

 -   Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite - Photoshop, Illustrator, and InDesign

 -   Strong understanding of layout, typography, brand consistency, and visual hierarchy

 -   Experience designing for both digital and print

 -   Ability to prepare and organize files correctly for production and web use

 -   Detail-oriented and able to follow direction while also thinking critically

 -   Able to self-manage and work independently in a remote environment

 -   Strong communication skills

 -   Reliable internet connection and consistent availability during working hours

 -   Experience with motion graphics or simple animation is a plus

 -   Basic familiarity with WordPress or Elementor is helpful, but not required



What We’re Looking For:



 -   Someone dependable, proactive, and organized

 -   A designer who produces thoughtful, polished work

 -   Someone who can manage multiple brands without losing attention to detail

 -   A tea
mber who takes ownership of projects and follows through

 -   Someone who is open to feedback and able to implement revisions carefully



Perks We Offer:



   -   Full-time remote position

   -   40 hours per week

   -   Flexible work schedule

   -   Work-from-home setup

   -   13th-month bonus

   -   Opportunity to work across a variety of brands and industries

   -   Long-term growth opportunity within an established marketing agency



To Apply, please respond to this posting by sending us a message including:



 -   a summary of your relevant experience

 -   your general availability

 -   your portfolio with graphic design samples

 -   examples of social media graphics, ad creative, and print materials if available

title: Recruiter
description:
Full-Time | US PST hours | WFH



We are looking for a highly organized and execution-driven Recruiter to own the end-to-end recruiting process and help build scalable hiring systems for a fast-growing eCommerce company.



This is a hybrid strategic and operational role focused on both recruiting execution and process building.



What You Will Do:

• Manage full-cycle recruiting (sourcing, screening, scheduling, and offer coordination)

• Build proactive talent pipelines for recurring and high-priority roles

• Source candidates beyond job boards (LinkedIn, referrals, outreach)

• Conduct structured screening interviews assessing skills and culture fit

• Build and improve hiring processes, SOPs, and workflows

• Maintain ATS and pipeline tracking (ClickUp or similar tools)

• Collaborate with hiring managers and provide regular updates

• Track hiring metrics and identify process improvements



Requirements:

• 3+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience (startup, DTC, or eCommerce preferred)

• Experience managing multiple roles and pipelines simultaneously

• Strong ATS/CRM experience (ClickUp, Greenhouse, Lever, etc.)

• Excellent written and verbal communication

• Highly organized, process-driven, and detail-oriented

• Strong ownership and ability to work independently



Nice to Have:

• Experience building hiring systems or SOPs

• Familiarity with structured hiring frameworks

• Experience hiring for marketing, creative, or technical roles



Please send your resume and answer the questions below

1. Have you managed multiple open roles across different departments simultaneously? If yes, what was the maximum number of open roles you handled at one time?

2. Briefly describe a hiring process or recruiting system you built or significantly improved. What was broken, and what did you change?

3. When managing 5+ open roles at once, how do you prioritize and ensure nothing falls through the cracks?

4. Beyond job boards, what sourcing strategies have you personally used to find strong candidates?

5. Describe a time you had to push back on a hiring manager to protect candidate quality or process integrity. What happened?

6. This role requires proactive pipeline building before roles become urgent. Have you built talent pipelines for future hiring needs before a role officially opened? If yes, briefly explain your approach.

title: Video Content Researcher (TikTok Focus) - $30/Project
description:
About the Role:

We are a fast-growing YouTube Media Studio (our flagship channel hit more than a million views in less than five months!) in the "Glow Up" niche. We are looking for a highly organized Content Researcher with a "Premium Eye" to source high end TikTok content for our videos.

high-quality, watermark-free clips per video that match a specific script.

Start your application with the word "AESTHETIC" so I know you read the instructions.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency



US$3-4/Hour

________________________________________________________________________________

Candidates may specialize in one subject (English or History) or be able to teach both. • Experience teaching in public/international schools.

• Skilled at working with young learners aged 5–18

Benefits

• Opportunity to teach using internationally recognized curricula.

• Regular enrollment system (not booking-based), ensuring a stable and consistent teaching schedule.



US$3-4/Hour

title: Customer Service Representative (CSR)
description:
METRO MANILA AND CAVITE APPLICANTS ONLY.

USAMDT is hiring a Customer Service Representative to support our U.S.-based mobile drug testing operations. You will be the first point of contact for customers, vendors, and internal teams. This role requires strong English communication, attention to detail, reliability, and the ability to work in a fast-paced, structured environment.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Phone and
 Communication

*Return voi
s within 30 minutes

*Provide clear expectations and timelines to callers

*Log all calls accurately

*Escalate urgent or emergency requests as required

*Respond to
s within 4 hours



Scheduling

*Coordinate with collectors and customers

*Schedule appointments and send calendar invites and reminders

*Maintain accurate job statuses using internal tracking codes

*Confirm collector and customer availability before finalizing schedules



Completion and Documentation

Customer Service and Sales Support

*Escalate to sales for formal follow-up

*Assist with claims, billing, and account setup

*Handle emergency dispatches with urgency and professionalism



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS

*Minimum of 3 years working with a small U.S.-based company

*At least 3 years of direct voice experience speaking with U.S. customers

*Strong verbal and written English (professional level required)

*Ability to multitask and prioritize in a high-volume environment

*Experience with Microsoft Office, SharePoint, and CRM tools

*Detail-oriented and customer-focused

*Comfortable following documented processes and protocols



ENGLISH REQUIREMENT

This role requires an elevated understanding of English. You must be able to understand American callers easily, communicate clearly without scripts, and handle time-sensitive or urgent conversations confidently.



POWER AND EQUIPMENT REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

Power reliability is your responsibility. If you cannot connect due to power issues, this role will not work.

Within 90 days of employment, you must have a backup power solution that can support a full shift.



Requirements

*Minimum of 7 to 8 hours of backup power

*Must support a laptop or desktop, second monitor, and internet modem/router

*Stand-alone battery bank solution required

*You may use multiple battery units combined to reach 7 to 8 hours

*You must provide specifications and a photo of your power setup



-->Failure to meet this requirement within 90 days will result in termination.



HEADSET REQUIREMENT

*You must use professional noise-cancelling headphones suitable for U.S. phone support.

*New hires will be provided a list of approved headset options at different price points.

*Headsets must clearly block background noise and provide clear voice quality.



TRAINING AND CAREER GROWTH

Initial Training (0–90 days)

*Learn scheduling and completion processes



Specialty Training (90–180 days)

*Train in secondary support roles



Promotions and Raises

*CSR Level 1 at 90 days with performance score of 4 out of 5 or higher

*CSR Level 2 after 1 year with additional raises per role mastered



Primary Roles

*Completion

*Scheduling

*Dispatch (including emergency dispatch support)

*Sales Support

*Claims Support



Secondary Roles

*Account Setup

*Billing

*DOT Training Support

*Randoms Management

*Vendor Management



Advanced Career Paths

*Lead CSR

*Sales Trainer

*Executive Assistant

*Data Engineer



COMPENSATION

*Starting pay is 4.00 USD per hour during training

*Raises at 90 days, 6 months, 9 months, and 1 year based on performance

*Additional incentives tied to KPIs and role proficiency



TIME OFF POLICY (DISCUSSED DURING INTERVIEW)

*First 90 days: No time off permitted

*Remainder of first year: Up to 5 unpaid days off

*After one year of employment: 5 paid days off, usable in 2-hour increments



-->Candidates will be asked in the interview to disclose any planned time off for the next 12 months.



IMPORTANT NOTES

*Applicants must currently reside in Metro Manila or Cavite

*This role requires stability, reliability, and long-term commitment

s

title: Google Specialist — High-Ticket B2B | US Market
description:
Who this is for

We are a US-based digital marketing agency managing campaigns for high-ticket B2B clients. Average client deal sizes start at $120,000. We need a specialist who has managed Google Ads and SEO where a single lead is worth $50,000+ to the client. If you have not done this at that level, do not apply.

This starts as one account. Perform well and you will be running 3–5 accounts within 90 days. We are growing fast and we need someone we can plug into every new client immediately.



What you will be doing

Google Ads:



-Audit, rebuild, and manage campaigns from scratch on every new account

-Exact and phrase match only — no broad match without 60 days of data to justify it

-Write qualifying ad copy with price signals and intent filters built into the headline

-Weekly search term reviews — adding negatives continuously, not once at setup

-Full conversion tracking setup — every form, call, download, and booking attributed correctly

-Google Display retargeting matched to each client's sales cycle length

-Report cost per qualified lead by campaign every month — not impressions, not CTR



SEO:



-Build keyword cluster architectures by product, use case, industry, and location

-Deliver full page briefs for each target — keyword, URL slug, H1, meta title, meta description, content outline, internal links

-Bottom-funnel commercial intent first, always

-Monthly rank tracking in Google Search Console from day pages go live

-Technical SEO audits — crawlability, page speed, schema, indexing issues flagged with specific fixes

-Competitor gap analysis on every new account

-Ranking=Traffic Traffic=Leads Leads=Satisfied Client





Requirements



-Minimum 3 years managing Google Ads for B2B clients specifically — not ecommerce, not consumer

-Proven SEO results you personally executed — rankings, traffic, or leads with before and after proof

-Current Google Ads certification if applicable

-GA4 proficiency — setup from scratch, not just reading reports

-Fluent written and spoken English





What you must submit — incomplete applications will not be opened



-SEO case study — one real example with keyword targets, pages built, Search Console screenshots, and the outcome.

-Successful Google Ad campaign that shows growth, leads, reporting, etc. 



You must deliver a monthly performance report for every account you manage. The report must be clean, professional, and written in plain English that a business owner can read without a marketing background. It must cover qualified leads generated, cost per qualified lead by campaign, keyword ranking movement, what was optimized that month, and the specific actions planned for the following month. No vanity metrics. No fluff. This report goes directly to our clients under the SK Marketing Solutions brand — it reflects on us, not just on you. If you cannot produce this consistently every month without being chased, this role is not for you.



Thanks a lot! 

Spencer Kinnett

Founder SK Marketing Solutions

title: Recruiter
description:
Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.



Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.



Values



Here are our Company Values and we’d love to have individuals who can be a culture-add to our team!



What We Offer



Permanently Remote

Pay wired directly to your bank account

$50 Monthly Stipend

Annual Bonus

Flexible PTO

Enjoy company time off during some of the major US and PH Holidays

Company-issued Device

Career fast track for performers and internal mobility

Learn from a team of Stanford, MIT, Google and Harvard alumni



Grow With Us



We're looking for an experienced Recruiter to join the Philippine Recruiting  team at Workstream. You'll be a key part of our global talent strategy, dedicated to sourcing top talent for our startup culture. The ideal candidate will be passionate about connecting exceptional talent with our innovative environment, proficient in assessing qualifications, and deeply aligned with our mission.



As a Recruiter, you'll play a crucial role in identifying and hiring top talent, making a direct impact on our high-performing team in the competitive SaaS industry.



Day in the Life:



-Drive the recruitment process from end to end, removing blockers and driving to a close

-Review and analyze resumes using our ATS software (Greenhouse) 

-Proactively source and engage potential candidates through various channels, including different job boards and social media

-Develop and execute creative sourcing strategies against prioritized requisitions

-Conduct comprehensive interviews and assessments to evaluate candidates' qualifications, skills, and cultural fit within our dynamic startup environment

-Manage various positions across different teams, including but not limited to sales, customer support, finance, and technology

-Partner closely with hiring managers to understand their talent needs, set expectations, and provide regular updates on candidate pipelines

-Ensure a positive and professional candidate experience throughout the recruitment process, from initial contact to offer acceptance

-Stay updated on industry trends, market dynamics, and competitor strategies to inform and refine our recruitment approach

-Monitor and report on recruitment metrics to enhance and streamline the recruiting process

-Contribute to the growth of Workstream's PH Recruiting function by developing and refining processes and serving as a thought partner for the rest of the team



Who You Are:



-At least 1 year experience in recruitment, with the ability to manage a diverse range of roles effectively

-Proficiency in leveraging various recruitment tools and platforms to source and engage candidates

-Exceptional verbal and written communication skills to effectively convey job opportunities and requirements

-Strong relationship-building skills with candidates, hiring managers, and cross-functional teams

-Ability to assess candidates' qualifications and evaluate their alignment with our startup culture and values

-Willingness to adapt to changing priorities and thrive in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment

-Collaborative mindset and the ability to work closely with diverse teams

-High ethical and professional standards, ensuring compliance with all relevant laws and regulations

-Prior experience in Recruiting for sales positions within a Tech company



Nice To Have



-Experience in Recruiting Sales positions within a SaaS company

-Experience in a startup environment

description:
Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. title: Short-Term Rental Social Media Strategist (Airbnb / Vacation Rentals)
description:
About the Role:

We are looking for a skilled Social Media Strategist to help grow and optimize our short-term rental brand. This role is focused on increasing visibility, engagement, and ultimately driving more bookings through strategic content and social media management.



If you understand how to turn content into conversions—not just likes—this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Social Media Audit



Review existing social media accounts and performance

Identify gaps, weaknesses, and opportunities

Provide actionable recommendations



2. Social Media Optimization



Optimize bios, profiles, highlights, and links

Ensure consistent branding across platforms

Apply best practices for visibility and growth



3. Market Research & Competitor Analysis



Research target audience and booking behavior

Analyze competitor strategies and content

Identify trends in the short-term rental space



4. Strategy Development



Create a clear social media strategy aligned with booking goals

Define posting schedule, content pillars, and tone

Set measurable goals (engagement, inquiries, bookings)



5. Content Planning



Develop a monthly content calendar

Plan campaigns, themes, and post ideas

Provide direction for content creation



6. Engagement Management



Engage with followers, comments, and DMs

Build relationships with potential guests

Interact with relevant accounts to increase visibility



Who We’re Looking For:



Experience managing social media for Airbnb, real estate, or hospitality (preferred)

Strong understanding of Instagram,
, and/or TikTok growth

Ability to think strategically (not just post content)

Experience with content planning and analytics

Excellent communication and organization skills



Bonus If You Have:



Experience working with short-term rental brands

Knowledge of booking funnels and guest behavior

Basic content creation or copywriting skills



Compensation:



Weekly pay (based on experience)

Long-term opportunity available



How to Apply:

To be considered, include the following:



Links to social media accounts you’ve managed

A short explanation of how you would increase bookings for a short-term rental

Your favorite social media platform and why



Start your application with the word: BOOKINGS so we know you read everything.



We’re looking for someone who can help turn social media into a consistent booking channel, not just a posting task.



Apply now if that sounds like you.

description:

lead development of WordPress using ACF, custom blocks, Twig templating, custom post types, and block-based themes, with performance, accessibility, SEO, and high-quality execution built in

have 7+ years of web development experience, ideally in agency environments

What separates the best from the rest:



advanced GSAP/ animations experience

mentorship, client management, and cross-team collaboration experience

experience optimizing performance, accessibility, SEO, security, and DevOps at scale

Edge and CDN strategy experience for modern web projects

Benefits await full-time contractors.

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

Admin &
 management

Social media & marketing support



Scheduling posts, engaging with comments, light content coordination across Instagram and



What we are looking for:



Experience

Prior VA experience in a medical, allied health, or clinic setting

Tools

GoHighLevel (GHL), scheduling, social media platforms

Communication

Excellent written English — you will be representing the clinic directly to patients

 or Instagram page · HIPAA certification



The role

Type - Full
 Time
